programme.title: The King of Queens: Buggie Nights

programme.title: The King of Queens: Knee Jerk

programme.title: The King of Queens: Present Tense

programme.title: The King of Queens: Sold-Y Locks
programme.desc: Doug convinces Carrie to sell her hair to a wigmaker so they can afford to go on a cruise with Deacon and Kelly. Meanwhile, when Arthur sees Carrie's new haircut, he starts thinking that she might not be his biological daughter.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Emotional Rollercoaster

programme.title: Movie: Bad Twin
programme.desc: Jen's twin nieces are sent to live with her when their mother Cassie ends up in psychiatric care. After discovering Jen's wealth, Cassie plots with the twins to get Jen to adopt them before murdering her.

programme.title: Movie: Killer Mom
programme.desc: A teen's birth mother suddenly reappears after her parents' have both died.

programme.title: Movie: Seduced by a Killer
programme.desc: A single mother becomes estranged from her teenage daughter over a man. The mom discovers that her daughter has fallen in love with a sadistic killer and must try to save her before it's too late.

programme.title: Movie: Married to a Murderer
programme.desc: A simple woman marries a wealthy man and is brought into a world of luxury. However when they return to his family's old home, his brother's jealousy grows to include his new wife and everyone finds themselves in danger.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Leg to Stand On
programme.desc: Police investigate when a severed leg is found in the garbage. When they realize they can't use conventional techniques to catch the killer, police must use scientific techniques like DNA testing and toxicology reports to find him.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Partners in Crime
programme.desc: It takes a long time and a very hot fire to cremate a human body, and thus destroy any evidence of foul play. But the medical examiner who performed the autopsy on the badly burned body of Charles 'Jack' Lynch found telltale clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Grave Evidence
programme.desc: The shooting of a man during a hunting trip is reopened years after the incident, and the victim's hunting partner becomes a suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Formula
programme.desc: The mother of a suspiciously murdered four-month-old was convicted, but an explanation for the death would come five months later from the most unlikely of sources: his newborn brother.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cement the Case
programme.desc: A man confesses to killing his wife, but forensic evidence may lead to another suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Innocence Lost
programme.desc: Five-year-old Melissa Brannen disappeared from a Christmas party in 1989. The fibers on her clothes were the only means for police to determine her abductor.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Church Disappearance
programme.desc: When a girl disappears from church, investigators fear a stalker is preying on children.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Photo Finish
programme.desc: A beautiful model goes missing and no one has a clue to her whereabouts until a park employee discovers photographs in a trash dumpster. With the photos are some vital pieces of information which eventually lead to a professional photographer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Line of Fire
programme.desc: A fundamentalist group starts attacking and robbing banks in the Pacific Northwest.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bad Blood
programme.desc: A young doctor in a rural community is accused of sedating and sexually assaulting two of his female patients. DNA tests demonstrate that the doctor is innocent, but the women continue to insist that he sedated and raped them.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sleight of Hand
programme.desc: Investigators search for an assailant who has avoided the law for sixteen years.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Scratching the Surface
programme.desc: Forensic scientists must find a way to "lift" the serial number from a 12-gauge shotgun.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dessert Served Cold
programme.desc: When a Massachusetts man dropped dead of an apparent heart attack, no one thought foul play was a possibility until police looked into his girlfriend’s odd behavior in the days before his death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Music Case
programme.desc: The sense of security in Waseca, Minnesota shatters when 12-year-old Cally Jo Larson is found dead in her home.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Haunting Vision
programme.desc: A woman who survived a deadly childhood fire sends police a letter charging that her father killed her mother 30 years ago.

programme.title: Forensic Files: With Every Breath
programme.desc: Investigators race to figure out what killed a couple on an Indian reservation in New Mexico, and discover that it was the dried feces of deer mice, which had become airborne and deadly.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Kill'igraphy
programme.desc: A man considered unstable by his neighbors is accused of killing his wife, but the medical examiner disagrees.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nursery Crimes
programme.desc: Medical investigators have no answers as to why children at a Texas hospital are dying at a higher rate than at any other hospital until they discover that one nurse seems to be on-duty in almost all the fatal cases.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Metal Business
programme.desc: Phillip Rouss' health declined, and doctors couldn't pinpoint the source of his illness.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dressed to Kill
programme.desc: When a six-year-old girl disappears without a trace, the parents become prime suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fire Proof
programme.desc: Investigates the worst arson spree in U.S. history which occurred in Seattle.

programme.title: Forensic Files: X Marks the Spot
programme.desc: Can a map tell who a serial killer really is?

programme.title: Forensic Files: Palm Print Conviction
programme.desc: A woman leaves a bar with a stranger only to have her body discovered the next morning.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Vow of Silence

programme.desc: Philadelphia authorities use an anonymous letter to locate a perpetrator.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Breaking the Mold
programme.desc: A family realizes that their health problems could be related to an uninvited 'guest.'

programme.title: Lost Cities of the Amazon: Secrets in the Jungle
programme.desc: New discoveries in the Amazon are revealing evidence of a long-lost civilization that built giant cities of untold treasures. With the help of the latest tech and cutting-edge archaeology, experts investigate the clues these mysterious people left behind.

programme.title: Lost Cities of the Amazon: Rise of a Superpower

programme.title: Lost Cities of the Amazon: Amazon Apocalypse

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Mysteries of Jesus

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: True Cross of Christ

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Old School Medicine
programme.desc: A man with a slashed wrist has a startling secret; a woman gives birth unexpectedly shocking the ER staff; a surgeon requires urgent treatment after falling off a bed while trying to help his patient.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Dr. Robot
programme.desc: Doctors use a robot to treat a seizing 7-year-old boy. A chef's tongue is swelling and it's only a matter of minutes before she won't be able to breathe. A woman who crashed her car insists her injured dog be treated first.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Oh, Deer!

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Temperature Rising
programme.desc: A woman with abdominal pains receives an unexpected diagnosis and a yoga instructor has a dangerously high temperature for no obvious reason.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: I'm So Dead
programme.desc: A woman stops eating because she believes she is dead. A runner goes blind in one eye during a marathon and takes a detour to the ER. Doctors are baffled by an ER tech's stroke-like symptoms, until someone he loves also becomes ill.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Rottweiler in the ER
programme.desc: While a shooting victim is brought to the hospital, a Rottweiler gets loose in the ER. A young mother's asthma attack turns quickly into a deadly heart failure. A young man comes into the ER comatose, covered with a mysterious rash.

programme.title: The Loud House: Don't You Fore-get About Me/ Tough Cookies

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Boss for a Day/ Pineapple RV
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs has an accident and leaves SpongeBob in charge of the Krusty Krab. SpongeBob and Patrick turn the pineapple into a mobile home to take Squidward on the road trip he deserves.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Best of Patrick Star
programme.desc: Patrick Star is the best and brightest of them all. Check out our favorite Bikini Bottom resident during his greatest and funniest moments.

programme.title: Nickelodeon's Unfiltered: Zombies Eat Unicorns!
programme.desc: Host Jay Pharoah introduces two mystery celebs hiding behind 3D animated filters. Darci Lynne Farmer, Gabrielle Nevaeh Green and Lex Lumpkin ask questions and gather clues to unveil our two special guests.

programme.title: Young Dylan: Teachable Moments
programme.desc: Rebecca is being bullied online, prompting Dylan to encourage Martin to respond to some of the posts. His posts are not anonymous, and the family must deal with the fallout.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Pull Up a Barrel/ Company Picnic
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs regales SpongeBob with tales from his old Navy days. Later, Mr. Krabs throws a company picnic to boost morale, but Plankton is hosting his own on the same day!

programme.title: Friends: The One With George Stephanopoulos
programme.desc: When a pizza guy accidentally delivers a pizza meant for George Stephanopoulos, who lives across the street to the female friends, the women decide to peek at the towel-clad former White House advisor with their binoculars.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the East German Laundry Detergent
programme.desc: Joey wants to get back together with a former girlfriend he dumped, so he tricks Monica into posing as his new gal pal. Ross helps Rachel, a laundry virgin, do her first load of wash. Chandler has a difficult time breaking up with his annoying girlfriend.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Butt
programme.desc: Joey gets his film break when he's hired to be Al Pacino's stunt butt. Chandler has second thoughts about a married woman who wants him to be her sex toy. Monica tries hard to prove to her friends that she really doesn't have an A-type personality.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Blackout
programme.desc: During a blackout, Chandler is trapped with a beautiful model and Rachel meets Paolo.

programme.title: Friends: The One Where Nana Dies Twice
programme.desc: Ross and Monica's grandmother dies; Ross falls into an open grave and hurts his back.

programme.title: Friends: The One With Mrs. Bing
programme.desc: Chandler's mother stirs up controversy when she kisses Ross; Rachel tries writing a novel.

programme.title: Friends: The One With All the Poker
programme.desc: When the guys are all playing poker, the girls decide it would be fun to join in. The guys have to teach them how to play the game. Except Monica who knows how to play and is a very competitive person, especially when it is up against her brother Ross.

programme.title: Friends: The One Where the Monkey Gets Away
programme.desc: After agreeing to baby-sit Marcel, a distracted Rachel loses him and calls animal control.

programme.title: Mom: Poodle Fuzz and a Twinge of Jealousy
programme.desc: When an injury temporarily lands Bonnie in a wheelchair, Christy is forced to take over as building manager and makes a surprising discovery.

programme.title: Mom: Smooth Jazz and a Weird Floaty Eye
programme.desc: Bonnie insists on meeting Adam's estranged brother and things get weird when he takes a romantic interest in Christy.

programme.title: Mom: Too Many Hippies and Huevos Rancheros
programme.desc: Christy and Bonnie rally around Marjorie when her husband has a stroke.

programme.title: Mom: Teenage Vampires and a White Russian

programme.title: George Lopez: George Finds Therapy Benny-ficial

programme.title: George Lopez: George Tries to Write a Wrong

programme.title: George Lopez: George Discovers Benny's Sili-Con Job
programme.desc: Benny takes George's wisecracks about her age to heart and decides to get ridiculously large breast implants to make herself look younger.

programme.title: Full House: Be True to Your Pre-School
programme.desc: Jesse lies on a pre-school application in order to enrol his twins in an advanced class.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sailor Mouth/ Artist Unknown
programme.desc: Bob learns a 'bad' word off of a dumpster; Bob is Squid's only student for an art class.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Good Krabby Name/ Move It or Lose It
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick advertise the Krusty Krab. Then, petitions are circulated to see which restaurant will get bulldozed.

programme.desc: A Russian man convicted of murder attempts an impossible escape from high security courtroom. A judge goes off on a disrespectful defendant and later, thieves drive a truck right into the lobby of a Texas courthouse.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A judge convicted of a felony is dragged from the courtroom; a man makes a desperate attempt to escape a courthouse after being told he's headed to prison; a defendant pays a heavy price for a profanity laced tirade aimed at a judge; and more.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Full Moon Rising
programme.desc: It's a full moon in New Orleans, and sure enough, all night long, the calls for the EMTs seem to get crazier and crazier. There's a machete hacking, a man whose finger is bitten off by a dog and a guy stabbed by a man dating his ex-wife.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Caught You, By Surprise
programme.desc: Police officers pursue suspected drug dealers, while Keeley saves a group of partiers from a violent schizophrenic.

programme.title: Nightwatch: When Work Becomes Family
programme.desc: It's New Year's in New Orleans and gun violence is rampant as police and EMS deal with armed robberies and shootings. Plus, EMT Gavin returns to the job, and everyone celebrates a new addition to the family.

programme.title: The Misery Index: When We Smash
programme.desc: We prove why online dating is dead, and an officer flasher and a clumsy partier battle to be masters of misery.

programme.title: The Misery Index: UK vs US Special
programme.desc: After some heated UK vs US banter, Jameela and the Tenderloins find out once and for all which of these great nations is truly the most miserable. Plus, Jameela has a big surprise fail for the Tenderloins.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Brownbeaten
programme.desc: The length it took Murr's eyebrows to grow back.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stripped of Dignity
programme.desc: The guys get a taste of babysitting while asking reluctant strangers to watch their kid, then head to the grocery store to conduct taste(less) tests with shoppers, and tonight's loser is forced to strip for the wrong people.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Hitting the Wrong Note
programme.desc: The guys dress to the nines, but act like zeroes while trying to get sympathy, and tonight's big loser faces the music in a tone-deaf punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Butt of the Joker
programme.desc: The guys pair up in focus group presentations, and tonight's loser tries to cure the public of a nasty habit, but gets people smoking mad.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Drum and Drummer
programme.desc: So many shoppers in the candy aisle during 'Star Struck'. The celeb that was on set while the guys filmed 'Brain Games'.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Pulling the Rug
programme.desc: Find out where Joe originally wanted to play hide n' seek, what Q's favourite dessert is, and what the crew was most afraid of during Murr's wig-pulling punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Chick Magnet
programme.desc: Find out which joker owned a bar in Staten Island, what had the crew crying laughing and whose dad grew up on a chicken farm.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Hump Day
programme.desc: Learn how the crew attracted more customers to eat at GRK, what piece of iconic 'Jokers' history was made in this same focus group space and who caused several delays in the filming of Q's zoo punishment.

programme.title: Movie: Couples Retreat
programme.desc: Three couples agree to vacation at an island resort while their friends are there to work on their marriage. Once all of the couples arrive on the remote island, they learn that marriage counselling is mandatory for all of them and they cannot leave.

programme.title: Movie: Couples Retreat
programme.desc: Three couples agree to vacation at an island resort while their friends are there to work on their marriage. Once all of the couples arrive on the remote island, they learn that marriage counselling is mandatory for all of them and they cannot leave.

programme.title: Lost Resort: Welcome to the Lost Resort
programme.desc: Eight wounded souls check in to embark on a journey of healing to overcome trauma.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: Thrillseekers 6
programme.desc: An alligator trainer who's almost alligator lunch, a clumsy cliff diver, and an amateur stunt man who will probably never go pro.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Thrillseekers 7
programme.desc: Thrill seekers are captured in their less than fine moments, from flying cars to bikes with two bicyclists.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Fingering the Man
programme.desc: Molly Austin takes a bachelorette party to the next level, and Jonathan Martin's parents give new meaning to the word 'cheap'. Plus, if you thought your family was embarrassing, Rachel Feinstein's might have them beat.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Crazy in Love
programme.desc: Brad Williams brings the heat, 'Street Fighter' style, Sydnee Washington has a hot date with Father Time, Yamaneika daydreams about being kidnapped, and Calvin Evans gets less than he bargained for on his no-frills plane ticket.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Up All Night
programme.desc: The hilarious Sydney Castillo wants that old thing back, aka his hair. Plus, funny woman Rachel Feinstein has her hands full on a playdate, and the hysterical Mark Viera feels the spirit of the wildcat in his new kicks.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Stage Five Clinger
programme.desc: Comedian Rita Brent reveals her number one tip for going number two at work, Kyle Erby thinks black folks should stick together, sometimes, and Vanessa Fraction gets an early sex-ed lesson. Plus, Owen Smith moves to LA to ditch a clinger.

programme.title: Movie: Where's the Money?
programme.desc: A young man from South Central Los Angeles must recover stolen money from a fraternity.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Comedy Knocked Up
programme.desc: Moshe Kasher does the best victory dance ever, Clayton English and Moshe get real playing patty cake, and Natasha Leggero reveals two men in one from her past.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: What Is Woke?
programme.desc: Thomas Dale puts a spell on Damien, Ali Kolbert knows what Thomas does to relax, and Matthew Broussard reveals Ali's favorite board game.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Smartest Inventions 4
programme.desc: Inventions include a bra that doubles as a gas mask, a bib used for eating while driving and slippers with headlights.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Smartest Inventions 5
programme.desc: Questionably brilliant innovations in portable toilets, beer-finding technology, weapon storage and wigs for newborns.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: Smartest Inventions 6
programme.desc: Stars offer hilarious commentaries while viewing footage of the world's dumbest people.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Inventions 8
programme.desc: Stars offer hilarious commentaries while viewing footage of the world's dumbest people.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Starfart Macchiato
programme.desc: Find out what game the Jokers have played five times throughout the show's history, and how the crew got poison ivy. Plus, learn what game the Jokers played that had them asking for extra turns.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Bellydancer
programme.desc: Learn about Murr and Sal's favourite sandwich, which Joker is certified in CPR and what gift Murr received when the show first started.

programme.title: Hot Ones: The Game Show: Love, Laughs and Lament
programme.desc: A pair of newlyweds go head to head against a pair of stand-up comedians to see who has the last laugh in the pepperdome. Only one team will fight through the pain and conquer Mount Scoville for a chance at $25,000.

programme.title: Hot Ones: Schoolboy Q
programme.desc: Find out how the five-time Grammy-nominated artist handles spicy food as he discusses his love of golf, his disdain for the 'Pokémon Rap' and his favorite shabby-shabu restaurant.

programme.title: House: Maternity
programme.desc: Dr. House exasperates his boss when he suggests two sick babies add up to an epidemic.

programme.title: House: Damned If You Do
programme.desc: When a nun comes into the clinic with swollen arms, a rash and bleeding in her palms Dr. House's diagnosis is a bad allergy, not a stigmata.

programme.title: House: The Socratic Method
programme.desc: Dr. House tries to save a schizophrenic woman who has a deadly deep vein thrombosis.

programme.title: House: Fidelity
programme.desc: When a young woman falls ill with a rare disease, Dr. House and Dr. Wilson treat her for the possibility of breast cancer. But when the diagnosis fails to be the answer the woman lapses into a coma and Dr. House suspects she has contracted a rare disease.

programme.title: House: Poison
programme.desc: A high school student seems to have been poisoned.

programme.title: House: DNR
programme.desc: Jazz musician John Henry Giles believes he is dying and signs a DNR to avoid a slow death.

programme.title: House: Histories
programme.desc: Dr. Foreman believes a homeless woman is faking seizures in order to get a meal ticket.

programme.title: House: Detox
programme.desc: House takes Cuddy's challenge and goes off Vicodin for a week in exchange for no clinic duty for a month. A young car accident victim cannot stop bleeding and if the team can't figure it out, he will die in a matter of days.

programme.title: House: Sports Medicine
programme.desc: A rare case of bone loss ends the comeback plans for major league pitcher Hank Wiggen.

programme.title: House: Cursed
programme.desc: A 12-year-old boy believes he is cursed after an Ouija board tells him he is going to die.

programme.title: House: Control
programme.desc: A billionaire causes upheaval at the hospital when he becomes Chairman of the Board.

programme.title: House: Mob Rules
programme.desc: Dr. House and his team race to diagnose a member of the mob and get him well enough to testify and enter the witness protection program. Meanwhile, Cuddy works to convince Vogler of House's importance to the hospital.

programme.title: House: Heavy
programme.desc: While House ponders who should be fired, a 10-year-old is admitted for a heart attack.

programme.title: House: Role Model
programme.desc: At a high-level fundraiser, up-and-coming Senator Tom Wright becomes violently ill. Vogler pushes House to take the case and dangles a new incentive in front of him: deliver a speech on behalf of Vogler's company and save the whole team.

programme.title: House: Babies and Bathwater
programme.desc: House and his team scramble to discover what's causing brain and kidney dysfunction in a pregnant woman. After the diagnosis, the woman struggles with a heartbreaking choice: to save her life or that of her unborn child.

programme.title: House: Kids
programme.desc: While a meningitis scare overwhelms the resources and staff of Princeton-Plainsboro Teaching Hospital, House zeroes in on a single patient: a 12-year-old whose symptoms are similar to, but not quite right for, meningitis.

programme.title: House: Love Hurts
programme.desc: The medical team try to stop a man's recurring strokes and save his life.

programme.title: House: Three Stories
programme.desc: House's ex-girlfriend Stacy Warner returns, not to be with House, but to get his help for her ailing husband. While House decides whether or not to take the case, Cuddy instructs him to substitute for a sick professor and present a lecture.

programme.title: House: The Honeymoon
programme.desc: House insists he can handle things when Stacy, the woman he once loved, asks him to diagnose her husband.

programme.title: House: Acceptance
programme.desc: When a death row inmate mysteriously and suddenly collapses after hallucinating, House takes the case. Dr. Cameron refuses to treat the patient in protest and feels they should treat a cancer patient instead.

programme.title: House: Autopsy
programme.desc: A nine-year-old terminal cancer patient is brought in after a hallucinogenic episode. Dr. House and his team struggle to diagnose what caused the hallucination. The patient is forced to decide whether she wants to have a very risky experimental treatment.

programme.title: House: Humpty Dumpty
programme.desc: A handyman falls from a roof and develops strangely darkened pinkies. Despite everything the team tries, the whole hand becomes infected and House is forced to amputate it.

programme.title: House: TB or Not TB
programme.desc: When Dr. Sebastian Charles is rushed to the hospital after collapsing, he determines that all the symptoms are from TB. However, Dr. House has a different opinion and requests additional tests.

programme.title: House: Daddy's Boy
programme.desc: Carnell, a college graduate, collapses at a graduation party from internal shocks and is rushed to the hospital. With his father Ken at his bedside it becomes apparent that the two have not been truthful with each other in their lives.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Culinary All-Stars
programme.desc: Guy's family loves cooking at home and great restaurant food, so they're combining the best of both worlds by firing up takeout with a twist. On the menu, there's tandoor chicken poutine and polenta flavour bomb, arancini and empandas.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Family Legacies
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's visiting spots keeping up with their family ties. In Pleasantville, N.J., a wife carries on her husband's legacy with his down-home chicken and waffles and righteous ribs. In Colorado Springs, family recipes are made at a BBQ joint.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Turkey, Taters And Dogs
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's digging into a righteous mashup of flavors. In Orlando, Fla. Joey Fatone is riding shotgun to a potato-centric palace, plus a trip to his very own hot dog hangout.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Sausage, Seafood and Shawarma
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's taking an eclectic, global-infused tour of Flavortown. In Minneapolis, an Italian spot carries on a fun, family pizza-making tradition, and in Miami, a champion chef cooks Haitian classics like griot, snapper and octopus.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Mega Mouthfuls
programme.desc: Guy's unhinging his jaw for some mega mouthfuls! In Robbinsville, New Jersey, a real-deal Italian market cookin' up prosciutto bread and their multi-meat 'boss of the sauce'.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Barbecue, Batter and Beer Can Chicken
programme.desc: Maui, Hawaii has ridiculous ramen and beer can chicken. Los Angeles has a food truck with a twist on fish and chips. Plus, a barbecue spot with fried chicken.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Burgers, Bacon And Bbq
programme.desc: In Little Rock, Ark., a funky farm-to-table spot piles up a pimento cheeseburger and homemade brats. In Napa, Calif., an amazing Asian joint cooks up kimchi fried rice and pork ramen. In San Antonio, Texas, Guy stops for some bomb barbecue.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Celebrity Chefs
programme.desc: On this menu, there's killer cavatelli from Alex Guarnaschelli, Brooke Williamson's seafood roll, shrimp and sticky rice from Beau MacMillan, G. Garvin's short rib ragu and Buddy Valastro's famous lobster tail pastries.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Beef Bonanza
programme.desc: This time around, Guy Fieri's diving into a serious beef bonanza! In Wilmington, Delaware, there's a 1940s Italian family spot that's making beef braciole and meaty ravioli from scratch.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Loaded, Stuffed and Fried
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's hitting the road and digging into joints that are loading it, stuffing it and frying it. In Santa Fe, N.M., a farm-to-table gem putting out hearty goodness like bison gravy fries and a lights-out lamb sandwich.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Crazy Chicken and Twisted Burgers
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's digging into crazy twists on chicken and burgers! In Wilmington, Delaware, there's a bourbon bar that's piling pork onto a patty and doctoring up chicken skins.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Family Meals
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is embracing family-run spots on this trip. In Ottawa, Canada, two brothers-in-law carryin' on a decades-long seafood tradition. In Richmond, Va., a mother-son duo running a breakfast, lunch and dinner joint in honor of their Pop.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Celebrity Chefs
programme.desc: On this menu, there's killer cavatelli from Alex Guarnaschelli, Brooke Williamson's seafood roll, shrimp and sticky rice from Beau MacMillan, G. Garvin's short rib ragu and Buddy Valastro's famous lobster tail pastries.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Kickin' It in Key West
programme.desc: Guy's checking out some of the awesome eats of Key West, Fla. From a funky little shack serving up New England seafood with coastal twists to a husband and wife team dishing up standout fish tacos.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Family Time
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's visiting some families keeping it real in the kitchen in Nashville.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Dynamite Duos
programme.desc: In New York's Lower East Side, Guy is pickling, smoking, curing and fermenting, everything from the goat necks to chicken wings to pig ears.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: A Taste Of Italy
programme.desc: Guy Fieri hits up his favorite Italian joints from over the years. In Scottsdale, Arizona, a real-deal Italian grocer crankin' out scratch-made staples like gnocchi and prosciutto that bring a tear to Guy's eye.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Around The World
programme.desc: It's an international affair as Guy Fieri revisits old favourites. The Triple D Nation took notice in Miami when a Latin-inspired place opened a fast-casual joint to serve the masses, and their burger tower is the talk of the town.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Savory Seafood and Square Pie
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's thinking outside the box. First up, he and his son, Hunter, check on an Italian spot in Boston dishing out double portions of their authentic eats.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: BBQ, Burgers and Beyond
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy's biting into burgers and barbecue. First up, he heads back to an O.G. Triple D BBQ joint in Oklahoma City to see what they're smokin' these days. Then, in Roy, Utah, a burger biz flippin' patties for the third generation.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Italian Inspired
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is getting in touch with his Italian roots. First up, he pops back into an Italian market in Baltimore, where the arancini and eggplant lasagna are both off-the-hook.

programme.title: 30 Minute Meals: Steak Out, Italian-Style
programme.desc: Rachael Ray's spin on the classic meat-and-potatoes dinner will have friends and family staying in on steak night.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Too Hot to Cook
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli and her buddy Faith Ford love to cook and test out recipes. Valerie decides to keeps things cool with a deliciously decadent lobster club sandwich and savory refrigerator pickles.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Grillin' and Chillin'
programme.desc: Marcela Valladolid kicks off a triple-threat meal with her grilled adobo rubbed chicken. Then, Jeff Mauro and Geoffrey Zakarian use the leftovers to make a jalapeno popper melt and chicken nicoise salad.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Camp Like a Girl
programme.desc: Trisha prepares caprese kebabs and quinoa corn chowder with shrimp, andouille sausage and pepper pouches.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Campfire Cookout
programme.desc: Molly Yeh is putting together some delicious campfire favourites and reliving her childhood by camping out in her backyard. Her husband Nick is building the fire, and they've invited some old camp buddies to join the fun.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home 10
programme.desc: It's a busy day on the ranch where Ree's husband is hauling hay with his crew and Ree fixes a make-ahead dinner and treats. She starts with a pot of chunky chili, along with cheesy cornbread muffins with honey butter and layered summer garden salad.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Perfect Picnic
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is throwing a prairie picnic for her friends.

programme.title: The Kitchen: BBQ and A
programme.desc: The Kitchen answers all of your burning BBQ questions. Geoffrey Zakarian starts by sharing the best cut of steak for the grill with his Grilled Hanger Steaks with Roasted Garlic Romesco Sauce.

programme.title: Giada at Home: Al Fresco
programme.desc: Giada heads to Palm Springs with her daughter and her boyfriend for a weekend of fun in the sun. Giada makes them a poolside, al fresco feast with picnic pasta, make-your-own flank steak hoagies and almond butter brownies.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like a Pro: Good Grilling
programme.desc: Ina Garten is fired up and sharing her advice for grilling and barbecuing like a pro. To start, hot coals work their magic on her Tuscan grilled Cornish hens, and she amps up the flavor on foolproof ribs with barbecue sauce.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: High-Roller Games
programme.desc: Money is no object for the four competing chefs as Guy Fieri declares it's High-Roller Night in Flavortown. First, Guy turns the GGG classic budget battle on its head by demanding the chefs spend over $60 when making their signature high-end dinner.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Carnival Games
programme.desc: The market has been turned into a midway so that four carnival food chefs can compete for a jackpot worth up to $20,000. First, they try their luck spinning a wheel of chance for the ingredients in their fried classic. Next, chefs play Guy Fieri's arcade.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Grill Masters
programme.desc: Four grill masters hit Flavortown for some red-hot grillin' games. First, they must think small and fit all the ingredients for their hometown grilled special into ultra-tiny grocery bags. Next, they play a game of Grocery Golf.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: All Burgers 2
programme.desc: Four burger masters are ready to see how they stack up against each other in a contest worth up to $20,000. First, the chefs must shop for the ingredients for an over-the-top burger using an underwhelming, tiny bag.

programme.title: Flipping 101 With Tarek El Moussa: Failing to Plan Is Planning to Fail
programme.desc: Lidia and Fernando are putting all their savings on the line to flip their first home in Rancho Cucamonga. She's a dreamer obsessed with expensive design. He is so neurotic about losing money, he's trying to skimp everywhere he can.

programme.title: Movie: Truth or Dare
programme.desc: A harmless game of truth or dare between young friends takes a deadly turn when something starts killing those who refuse to answer truthfully or to follow through on a dare. One of its players tries to figure out how to end the game before it's too late.

programme.title: The Hunt: Race Against Time: Coasts
programme.desc: The coast is the only place on the planet where predators from air, land and sea come together; powered by the tides and thrashed by waves, this is a world of continuous change. Opportunities never last long, so hunters are always in a race against time.

programme.title: Africa: Kalahari
programme.desc: In Africa's ancient southwest corner, two deserts sit side by side; water is in short supply, yet these deserts are full of life because the creatures that live there have turned the rules of survival on their head.

programme.title: Africa: Savannah
programme.desc: East Africa is a land that is constantly changing. In order to survive, creatures must be able to deal with twists and turns, no matter how hostile and unpredictable. This unique and varied land is a haven for life.

programme.title: Africa: Congo
programme.desc: The Congo rainforest covers the very heart of Africa and is a dynamic and pulsating habitat, packed with life. From the competitive centre of the forest to the open edge of the Atlantic Ocena, this is all about carving out space in a crowded world.

programme.title: Africa: Cape
programme.desc: Two great ocean currents, one cold and one warm, sweep around the continent's Great Cape.

programme.title: Africa: Sahara
programme.desc: North Africa is home to the greatest desert on Earth, the Sahara. This vast wilderness is the toughest part of the African continent.

programme.title: Africa: Kalahari
programme.desc: In Africa's ancient southwest corner, two deserts sit side by side; water is in short supply, yet these deserts are full of life because the creatures that live there have turned the rules of survival on their head.

programme.title: Africa: Sahara
programme.desc: North Africa is home to the greatest desert on Earth, the Sahara. This vast wilderness is the toughest part of the African continent.

programme.title: Seasonal Wonderlands: New England
programme.desc: New England is the stage for the most incredible colour change on Earth, when the greens of summer give way to the golds and reds of autumn. See how this vibrant fiesta is created by the battles between the trees and the forests' inhabitations.

programme.title: The Hunt: The Hardest Challenge
programme.desc: The contests between predators and prey are the most dramatic events in nature. The premiere episode reveals the extraordinary range of techniques predators use to catch their prey.

programme.title: The Hunt: In the Grip of Seasons: Arctic
programme.desc: This episode looks at the challenges of hunting in the Arctic, the most seasonal place on Earth. To a predator, seasonal change is a problem; it means that all the parameters of the hunt change too.

programme.title: The Hunt: Hide and Seek: Jungles
programme.desc: Follow tigers, harpy eagles, chimpanzees, army ants and other predators as they rise to the challenge of hunting within the forest. The prize for succeeding at nature's great game of hide-and-seek is one worth winning.

programme.title: The Hunt: Hunger at Sea: Oceans
programme.desc: This episode follows blue whales, sharks, sea lions and dolphins to reveal the strategies they use to hunt for prey. The ocean is an immense wilderness; predators face an endless search to find and catch food, yet the ocean is home to remarkable hunters.

programme.title: The Hunt: Nowhere to Hide: Plains
programme.desc: The open arenas of grassland and desert make up half of all land on our planet. In these exposed habitats, predators like cheetahs, bald eagles and lions can usually see their prey. But it works both ways: their prey can see them too.

programme.title: The Hunt: Race Against Time: Coasts
programme.desc: The coast is the only place on the planet where predators from air, land and sea come together; powered by the tides and thrashed by waves, this is a world of continuous change. Opportunities never last long, so hunters are always in a race against time.

programme.title: Planet Earth II: Cities
programme.desc: Rooted on the slope of a rocky hill in Namaqualand, South Africa stands The Namaqua Rock Fig Tree. with the ability to withstand the unforgiving conditions of the surrounding desolate landscape, and with minimal rainfall, it is a testament to survival.

programme.title: Planet Earth II: Islands
programme.desc: For some, remote islands offer sanctuary away from the mainland: the tiny pygmy three-toed sloth only survives because of the peace and safety offered by its Caribbean island home, while seabirds like albatross thrive in predator-free isolation.

programme.title: Planet Earth II: Mountains
programme.desc: In this episode we climb high into the world's great mountain ranges. Only a few pioneering animals have what it takes to survive up here, they are amongst the most elusive and mysterious on the planet.

programme.title: Most Wanted Sharks

programme.desc: Dr. Oakley deals with a tricky bladder problem in a cat and a rowdy bison needs wrangling.

programme.desc: Follow veterinarian Dr. Jan Pol as he treats animals at his clinic in rural Michigan.

programme.desc: Features bronze bells, wooden airplane propellers, charcoal briquettes and gas log fireplaces.

programme.desc: Featuring artist brushes; DEF tank heaters; game tables; art glass wall sconces.

programme.desc: Learn how familiar objects of everyday life are created, including the secrets to manufacturing golf balls, furniture handles, parking meters and room dividers.

programme.title: How It's Made: Fiberglass Insulation, Wooden Ducks, Gumball Machines, and Exhaust Systems
programme.desc: Learn how fibreglass insulation is made, along with wooden ducks, gumball machines and exhaust systems.

programme.title: How It's Made: Crayons, Wooden Kayaks, Lawn Mowers, Gold Chains
programme.desc: Follow the production of crayons, wooden kayaks, lawn mowers and gold chains.

programme.title: How It's Made: Socket Sets, Leather Shoes, Aluminium Water Bottles, Bike Chains
programme.desc: Socket Sets, Leather Shoes, Aluminium Water Bottles and Bike Chains.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned
programme.desc: Some of the world's most incredible engineering projects are now deserted.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Swamp of Despair
programme.desc: In a remote Louisiana swamp, the ruins of a massive industrial operation suggest that something evil once happened here, and new discoveries at this eerie site reveal what these abandoned buildings were for and why they were deserted.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Curse of Satan's Catacombs
programme.desc: An abandoned system of caves was once the meeting place of a secret society that worshiped Satan and performed black magic. New discoveries at this mysterious site reveal what really happened here and why a Founding Father was a frequent guest.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Labyrinth of the Dead
programme.desc: Tunnels filled with human bones lie beneath the streets of Paris, and this horrifying engineering marvel points to a dark secret. New discoveries reveal why this grisly underground death maze was built, and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Swamp of Despair
programme.desc: In a remote Louisiana swamp, the ruins of a massive industrial operation suggest that something evil once happened here, and new discoveries at this eerie site reveal what these abandoned buildings were for and why they were deserted.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Curse of Satan's Catacombs
programme.desc: An abandoned system of caves was once the meeting place of a secret society that worshiped Satan and performed black magic. New discoveries at this mysterious site reveal what really happened here and why a Founding Father was a frequent guest.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Escobar's Castle
programme.desc: The ruins of a once-palatial compound contain the secrets of one of history's most notorious criminals. Plus, new discoveries reveal why this high-security estate was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: The Yeti
programme.desc: New investigation of declassified Soviet files reveals evidence of an explanation for the grisly deaths of nine students who went missing in Siberia. Scientists examine clues that may prove the existence of a yeti.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Death From the Sky and Mexican Chupacabra
programme.desc: In Britain, a missing man's body is found with electrocution burns and a green ointment on him, his case is mysteriously closed down. Plus, hundreds of vampire-like attacks in Mexico leave livestock drained of blood.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Spontaneous Human Combustion and Mexican Pilot UFO
programme.desc: In Oklahoma, February 2013, a man is found completely incinerated to a pile of ashes in his own home. Pilot Carlos de los Santos was en route to Mexico City Airport when he was suddenly surrounded by three UFOs in the sky.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Are Aliens Attacking Our Nuclear Arsenal?
programme.desc: Across the globe, senior military personnel witness UFOs above nuclear weapons bases and in some cases UFOs are reported to shut down nuclear missiles.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Lost Giants of Georgia and the Bridge of Death
programme.desc: In Borjami Valley, a team of experts uncover bones they believe belongs to a human that is over nine feet tall. Also, strange reports of a large, underwater creature have come from people living near the remote Lake Labynkyr in Siberia.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Alien Flights of Horror
programme.desc: Across America run-ins between planes and UFO's are reported, sometimes with terrifying and tragic consequences. Find out if there is danger in our skies and if the government is covering up the truth behind these encounters.

programme.title: Open Source Money: The Race is On
programme.desc: The race to dominate the future of money roars ahead as China launches a blockchain network and Chinese digital money, while Facebook backed Libra is shut down by US govt. Dragonchain heads to Daytona with their future hanging in the balance.

programme.title: How It's Made: Retractable Cords, Wood Frame Sports Cars, Sushi
programme.desc: Retractable cords; wood frame sports cars; sushi.

programme.title: Mummy Mysteries: The Screaming Mummy Conspiracy
programme.desc: The horrifying remains of the 3,000-year-old Screaming Mummy have haunted Egyptologists for decades. A team of experts re-examine the evidence, revealing an epic conspiracy to murder a king and a punishment intended to curse a soul for eternity.

programme.title: Mummy Unexplained Files: Curse of the Warrior King
programme.desc: The mangled mummy of a pharaoh is a 3,000-year-old cold case with brand-new leads; a team of experts in Egyptian archaeology and criminal forensics investigate fresh evidence to discover the truth behind this brutal death.

programme.title: Contact: Alien Mysteries: Are We Alone?
programme.desc: A team of experts use the latest science and cutting-edge technology to investigate if extraterrestrial life has contacted humankind, and what they discover could reveal if there's an international conspiracy to cover it all up.

programme.title: Contact: Alien Mysteries: Hunt for the Alien Relics
programme.desc: New clues suggest that aliens were in contact with the ancient cultures of Mesoamerica, and to prove it, a team of experts hunt down mysterious artifacts that could change everything we know about our place in the cosmos.

programme.title: Contact: Alien Mysteries: The Volcano Enigma
programme.desc: New evidence points to a strange link between UFO sightings and volcanoes, and to test the explosive theory, a team of experts investigate one of the most mysterious mass reports of alien contact in history.

programme.title: Contact: Alien Mysteries: Alien Crater of Doom
programme.desc: New discoveries of strange evidence in the forests of Argentina suggest an alien craft landed here, and to prove it, a team of experts use cutting edge technology to investigate the area and hunt down the truth.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Fallen Angels
programme.desc: In 2002 a 12-year-old girl from Oregon City, OR goes missing on her way to school and the whole town is clamoring to find her. The police investigation offers little in the way of leads, and then the unthinkable happens - a second girl disappears.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Marked for Murder
programme.desc: Friends and family are stunned when an esteemed criminal law professor and father of two, is executed in his garage. Investigators follow a series of leads that take them on a statewide hunt through Florida, in search of the murderous masterminds.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Memphis Blues
programme.desc: In July of 2010, NBA star and family man Lorenzen Wright goes missing outside of Memphis, TN. When his dead body is discovered in the woods, investigators find that this case is far from a slam dunk.

programme.title: 48 Hours on ID: NCIS: One of Their Own
programme.desc: Navy Petty Officer Lea Anne Brown and her friend Michael Patton were found beaten, shot in the head, and dumped in the woods. The murder appeared to be targeted, but no one knew why. NCIS agents were determined to solve this murder of one of their own.

programme.title: 48 Hours on ID: NCIS: The Sting
programme.desc: A tattooed NCIS agent with a black belt goes undercover to find the killer of a navy petty officer.

programme.title: 48 Hours on ID: NCIS: The Lost Boy
programme.desc: In 1979, 6-year-old Etan Patz left his New York City home headed for a school bus stop but never made it. And he's never been found. Richard Schlesinger tells the story of the lost boy that continues to haunt investigators.

programme.title: 48 Hours on ID: NCIS: Don't Scream
programme.desc: A young wife covered in blood calls 911 to report she attempted suicide, but she changed her story while clinging to life. Did she try to kill herself, or did her estranged husband want her dead? Erin Moriarty reports.

programme.title: 48 Hours on ID: NCIS: The Sting
programme.desc: A tattooed NCIS agent with a black belt goes undercover to find the killer of a navy petty officer.

programme.title: 48 Hours on ID: NCIS: Jayme Closs Comes Home
programme.desc: Eighty-eight days after Jayme Closs's parents were murdered and she disappeared from her home in Barron, WI she miraculously appeared from out of the woods in Gordon, WI. She was thin and frightened but alive. Reported by CBS News correspondents.

programme.title: 48 Hours on ID: NCIS: FindJodi
programme.desc: Jodi Huisentruit, a TV anchor in Mason City, Iowa, mysteriously disappeared on her way to work in1995. For 23 years both local police and 48 hours have continued to investigate this case and now have new leads. Jim Axelrod reports.

programme.title: 48 Hours on ID: NCIS: One of Their Own
programme.desc: Navy Petty Officer Lea Anne Brown and her friend Michael Patton were found beaten, shot in the head, and dumped in the woods. The murder appeared to be targeted, but no one knew why. NCIS agents were determined to solve this murder of one of their own.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: No GoodByes
programme.desc: A mother arrives home to have lunch with her teenage daughter and walks into a nightmare she will never forget.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Before Her Eyes
programme.desc: A teenage couple out on a date are ambushed by a gun wielding madman. The lone survivor shares their harrowing account of what happened that fateful night.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: A Predator in Deerfield
programme.desc: When a young mother and her 6-month-old child disappear off the quiet streets of Deerfield Beach Florida, it is the beginning of a terrifying murder mystery.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Deadly Hymn
programme.desc: The murder of a beloved and talented church organist sends police on a disturbing search for answers.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Smoke and Lies
programme.desc: Police investigate a residential house fire and discover it was intentionally set to cover-up a savage murder. Had the killer managed to destroy all the evidence or was there a clue he overlooked?

programme.title: Deadly Women: DIY Burial
programme.desc: Dig into the world of these Deadly Women... and in their 'DIY Burial,' you will find blood and bone.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Get Rich Quick
programme.desc: These women think their men are worth more dead than alive. A scorned Southern belle tries to cash in on her ex's life; a countess clings to her riches through violent means; and a mother of two trades her husband for another shot at the good life.

programme.title: Deadly Women: In the Family
programme.desc: Some killers don't go far to find their victims. Driven by revenge, greed and family 'honor,' these women turned on their own. When these Deadly Women struck, they kept it 'In the Family.'

programme.title: Deadly Women: Second Best
programme.desc: Being the 'other woman' is a lonely life. Some turn rejection into rage. A call girl craved the high life, a teen mom eradicated her rival, and a lesbian love affair ripped a family apart. These Deadly Women refused to play 'Second Best'.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Gambling Lives Away
programme.desc: These women love to gamble; but when the money's all gone, the stakes turn deadly. A transgender woman is willing to kill for a new body; a mother and daughter trade a family member for a payout; and a wife tries to bury her debts along with her husband.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Self-Made Widows
programme.desc: When these women fell out of love they didn't walk away; they chose a permanent separation with financial benefits. They all wanted to be single but with no strings attached; they were 'Self Made Widows'.

programme.title: Betrayed: Death by Desire
programme.desc: 34-year-old Paige Birgfeld is the ultimate multi-tasker - balancing four jobs, three kids, and two ex-husbands. No one realizes that beneath all this activity, Paige is also hiding a deep, dark secret that will eventually lead to an evil betrayal.

programme.title: Betrayed: Unholy Alliances
programme.desc: Church secretary Dorothy 'Dot' Finelli, 59, goes missing and turns up dead, as police explore if she's killed by a jealous new Internet date or somebody she's known for years within her own family circle.

programme.title: Air Aces: Gabby Gabreski
programme.desc: U.S. Air Force Pilot Francis Gabby Gabreski made it his personal mission to be the best flying ace there ever was.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Closing the Ring
programme.desc: By late summer 1944, the Allied forces in north-west Europe were thrusting towards the German border. Paris and Antwerp were liberated, but then supply problems brought the advance to a halt. Meanwhile, Stalin had halted his main thrust towards Berlin.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT to Get Out of Debt
programme.desc: After suffering a serious injury, Jaime Jones helplessly watches his bills and late notices on mortgage payments pile up. With his family's welfare at stake, he dons a disguise and robs banks to pay off his debts. But his greed will be his downfall.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Wear a Pink Shirt
programme.desc: Abraham Cavazos shot a man at a party and fled to Mexico, where multiple women supported him. Although he changed identities, locations and girlfriends, the authorities found him.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Silence a Witness
programme.desc: An Oklahoma drug lord killed a man for revenge, and fled to Mexico to escape prosecution.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Rob a Pawn Shop
programme.desc: Stolen weapons dealer, Conan Helsley, robs a pawnshop with his girlfriend and older brother. Cops eventually hunt them down and put the trio behind bars, but Conan manages to escape!

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Ninth Place at Poker
programme.desc: Randall Zandstra shot his ex-wife's boyfriend and got 12 years in jail. Due to a technicality, there was a retrial. Zandstra fled, ran to Vegas, winning big in poker and running mail fraud. Authorities finally track him down and he is now in a NJ prison.

programme.desc: Canadian George Beurling broke every rule in the book yet became one of the greatest fighter pilots of World War II.

programme.desc: U.S. Air Force Pilot Francis Gabby Gabreski made it his personal mission to be the best flying ace there ever was.

programme.title: Air Aces: Robin Olds
programme.desc: In July 1966, North Vietnam's fleet of MiG-21s is hammering the US Air Force. With the help of his pilots, Colonel Robin Olds masterminds Operation BOLO.

programme.title: Air Aces: Red Tails
programme.desc: Pressure from African-American activist groups pushed President Roosevelt to initiate a Blacks-only fighter pilot training program during WWII.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Jelly Bryce: The Perfect Shot

programme.title: American Lawmen: Sheriff Baker and the Everglades Blood Feud

programme.title: Gunslingers: Wild Bill: Marksman and Marked Man

programme.title: American Lawmen: Allan Pinkerton: Saving Lincoln
programme.desc: Celebrated P.I. Allan Pinkerton is hired to protect a strategic railroad from attack, but as his investigation unfolds, he uncovers a hidden conspiracy to assassinate President Lincoln.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Petrosino vs. the Mafia
programme.desc: Turn-of-the-century Little Italy is a dangerous place, but as New York City's first Italian-American detective, Joe Petrosino is determined to do whatever it takes to protect his people.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: American Gangster

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Albert Anastasia

programme.title: Flea Market Flip: Heads or Tails?

programme.title: Flea Market Flip: Flippin' Feathers
programme.desc: An engaged couple go up against some creative friends.

programme.title: Flea Market Flip: Rocker Dudes vs. Designing Moms
programme.desc: Rocker dudes, Dave and Ryan are throwing down against designing moms Charlotte and Jill in a battle for Total Flea Market Domination.

programme.title: Flea Market Flip: You May Now Flip the Bride
programme.desc: Stylish lovebirds, Princess and Mark Anthony, compete against designing darlings, Simone and Christian.

programme.title: Flea Market Flip: Are Horseshoes Really Lucky?
programme.desc: Upcycling husband and wife team, Jeff and Ilana take on flipping friends Jeannine and Robin. The fun begins when each team gets $500 and only one hour to find pieces that need a little TLC at the Elephant's Trunk Flea Market in New Milford, Connecticut.

programme.title: Flea Market Flip: Bilingual Beauties vs. Flip-Sters
programme.desc: Professional flip-sters, Jen and Kyle go head-to-head with bilingual beauties, Lindsay and Marizol (they might speak Spanish and Creole, but their first language is bargaining).

programme.title: Flea Market Flip: Family Feud Style
programme.desc: Father/ son duo, TJ and Mike, go toe-to-toe against Mother/ daughter team, Jess and Hettie.

programme.title: Flea Market Flip: Hold Onto Your Hat and Keep a Lid on It
programme.desc: Eclectic friends, Eddie and Rodney go up against Brandon and Sam, a couple who isn't afraid to get their hands dirty to find a bargain.

programme.title: Flea Market Flip: Best Flipping Friends Take on Flipping Fellas
programme.desc: Sassy friends, Katie and Jennifer go up against best buds, Scotty and Eddie.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: For the Birds
programme.desc: A multi-generational, environmentally conscious family living in a designated bird sanctuary in Osprey, FL asks design expert Lucas Congdon to create both a human pool paradise and a bird pond oasis, all in one outdated, rundown backyard.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Old Pool, New Dreams
programme.desc: These homeowners have big backyard dreams, but their outdated pools and spas are getting in the way.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Dream Mulligan
programme.desc: Lucas is tasked with a challenging project: repair and remodel an unusable pool for a famous golfing family. Puzzled as to how this pool was even built, Lucas creates an ocean-themed pool with fire features, an infinity edge and his first water couch.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Sliding into Neverland
programme.desc: Golfer J.B. Holmes says he never wants to grow up, but his wife wants relaxation. Challenged with making this two-in-one staycation a fun-filled destination, Lucas creates a sports area, blissful sun shelf and his first covered slide.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: What's Up Dock?
programme.desc: Lucas builds a giant pool for a dear friend-turned client. Lucas creates a dream backyard with a dock, cascading waterfalls a fire pit and audio/visual entertainment swim-up bar.

programme.title: Cake Wars: Champs: Pokemon
programme.desc: Pikachu and the rest of the Pokémon inspire one of the most intense baking battles of all time. Four champion bakers battle for their cake to be the centerpiece of the party, but only one will remain undefeated and collect $10,000.

programme.title: Cake Wars: Champs: Disney Princesses
programme.desc: It's an adventure for the ages with Cinderella, Ariel, Princess Jasmine and many more, as four champion bakers battle to have their amazing cake creation as the centrepiece of a party celebrating Disney's princesses.

programme.title: Chopped: Sweets: Chocolate Perfection
programme.desc: In this all-chocolate challenge, Scott Conant challenges four pastry artists to make every chocolate lover's dream come true by whipping up decadent, chocolatey creations that are as beautiful as they are craveable.

programme.title: Chopped: Sweets: Glazed and Confused?
programme.desc: Scott Conant welcomes four chefs to a doughnut-themed competition, and they must make sense of what's in the baskets before they can create sugary, deep-fried masterpieces.

programme.title: Chopped: Sweets: Freeze, Please!
programme.desc: Scott Conant gives four chefs a cool challenge to create spectacularly frosty desserts. As the clock ticks down on the first round, it's unclear whether all the chefs will finish in time.

programme.title: Chopped: Sweets: Cake Stakes
programme.desc: It's no cakewalk as Scott Conant asks four big-time bakers to create fantastic cakes in record time. In round one, time management is a challenge, and they must adapt quickly.

programme.title: Chopped: Sweets: Neapolitan Delight
programme.desc: Scott Conant welcomes four chefs to battle with three classic flavours- strawberry, vanilla and chocolate. In the first round, a tricky Chinese delicacy is a sign that only the strong will survive.

programme.title: Carnivorous: The Meatiest Game in Town
programme.desc: Courtney gets her pork chop on in Nashville before heading to Chicago for a whole smoked goat. In Boston, she indulges in a classic Yankee pot roast, and she makes a stop in Washington, D.C. for a burger party.

programme.title: Carnivorous: Smoke and Soul and Rock and Roll

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Cali Cookout
programme.desc: Roger Mooking meets San Francisco-based chef Thomas McNaughton at a farm in Healdsburg, Calif., for a live-fire feast of epic proportions. They affix a whole pig to a metal cross to cook over hot coals for several hours.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Rad Rigs

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Pig Out

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Smokin' Sides and Sweets

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Red-Hot Roasts
programme.desc: Roger visits two caterers in the South who specialize in live-fire cookouts. He starts in Chattanooga, Tennessee where Argentinian grill master Mariano Cebrián has an incredible collection of portable rigs to create fantastical live-fire events.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Surf And Turf
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is scouring the country for fiery fresh takes on the beloved classic combination, surf and turf.

programme.desc: Alvin thinks he's losing his mind when Simon goes missing and no one else even remembers who Simon is. When the girls at school cast votes for the cutest chipmunk on the bathroom wall, Alvin worries about the results.

programme.title: Movie: Splitting Adam
programme.desc: A teen stumbles upon a cloning machine and makes multiple copies of himself to tackle all of his problems.

programme.title: The Loud House: Suite and Sour/ Back in Black
programme.desc: After Mom and Dad win a trip to a resort, they decide to take the kids. When Lucy gets a crush on a 'normal' boy, her sisters give her a makeover.

programme.title: The Loud House: Making the Grade/ Vantastic Voyage
programme.desc: When Lincoln's four-year-old sister, Lisa, gets put into his 5th grade class, his social standing is at stake. Sick of their family van always falling apart, the kids decide to try and trick Dad into buying a cool new van.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Club SpongeBob/ My Pretty Seahorse
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick build a small clubhouse and tell Squid he can't join. Spongebob finds a stray sea horse.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Dunces and Dragons/ Mermaid Man and Barnacle Boy VI: The Motion Picture
programme.desc: A freak jousting accident lands Bob and Pat in a medieval Bikini Bottom.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Survival of the Idiots/ Dumped
programme.desc: Bob and Patrick sneak inside Sandy's treedome while she's hibernating; Gary seems to like Patrick better than SpongeBob, so Bob becomes jealous and buys other pets to get Gary back.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Procrastination/ I'm With Stupid
programme.desc: Bob is easily distracted from an essay; Bob and Pat attempt to prove who's smarter.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Patrick! The Game/ The Sewers of Bikini Bottom
programme.desc: Patrick invents a new boardgame. Later, SpongeBob and Squidward flush Mr. Krabs' safe and must go into the sewers to find it.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Mermaidman and Barnacle Boy/ Pickles
programme.desc: Bob and Pat's favourite superheroes are in a retirement home; Bob loses self-confidence.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpongeBob, You're Fired!
programme.desc: In order to save money, Mr. Krabs fires SpongeBob; however, unable to just "do nothing", SpongeBob decides to go back to work, no matter what - or where.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Driven to Tears/ Rule of Dumb
programme.desc: Sponge Bob fails his driver's test again, Pat asks them to prove the test can be passed.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpongeBob LongPants/ Larry's Gym
programme.desc: SpongeBob gets a pair of long pants, but they change his life in unexpected ways.When Larry the Lobster opens a new gym in Bikini Bottom, SpongeBob becomes his best customer.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: A Flea in Her Dome/ Donut of Shame
programme.desc: Sandy must get rid of her Tree Dome of fleas; Patrick feels bad about taking a donut.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Mall Girl Pearl/ Two Thumbs Down
programme.desc: Pearl gets a job to be cool like her friends, but the only store that's hiring is the lamest store at the mall. SpongeBob loses the use of his thumbs, and must get them back in working order before his entire life falls apart.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Someone's in the Kitchen With Sandy
programme.desc: Plankton steals Sandy's fur to disguise himself as her to steal the Krabby Patty formula.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sharks vs. Pods/ CopyBob DittoPants
programme.desc: SpongeBob gets in over his head with the Sharks. Plankton creates an evil clone of SpongeBob.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sandy's Rocket/ Squeaky Boots
programme.desc: Bob and Pat accidentally launch Sandy's rocket ship into space; boots in lieu of pay.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sold!/ Lame and Fortune
programme.desc: When SpongeBob and Patrick think their homes have been sold, they move away. When fortune cookies start predicting the future, Plankton realizes he can twist them to his own evil schemes.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Hooky/ Mermaidman and Barnacleboy II
programme.desc: Patrick and SpongeBob ignore warnings; SpongeBob follows superheroes for a day.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Pull Up a Barrel/ Company Picnic
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs regales SpongeBob with tales from his old Navy days. Later, Mr. Krabs throws a company picnic to boost morale, but Plankton is hosting his own on the same day!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Goodbye, Krabby Patty?
programme.desc: Squidward must make Patrick and SpongeBob friends again after they learn that sponges and sea stars aren't ususally friends.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Mikey Gets Shellacne
programme.desc: Michelangelo is tired of being the 'runt of the litter.' But when he fools around with some mutagen, he gets a dangerous infection that is mutating out of control.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Target: April O'Neil
programme.desc: April tries to resume a normal teenage life, but when Karai starts hunting her again, April realizes she may have put her new friend Casey Jones in danger as well.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Slash and Destroy
programme.desc: The Turtles find themselves being hunted by a new threat: another mutant turtle called Slash, who has a personal vendetta against the brothers.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Kraang Conspiracy
programme.desc: Feeling left out of the action, April insists on joining the Turtles on a mission to TCRI, where they learn a shocking secret about April's past.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Christmas Everyday
programme.desc: The globe is put into gridlock after Timmy wishes for 365 days of Christmas a year.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Merry Wishmas!
programme.desc: When Timmy doesn't get what he wants for Christmas he simply wishes for it.

programme.title: Movie: A Fairly Odd Christmas
programme.desc: Timmy Turner is trying to grant kids' wishes, but he ends up causing kids' names to disappear off of Santa's good list. Timmy has to work with his childhood friend Tootie to make sure Christmas isn't ruined.

programme.title: Movie: Tiny Christmas
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve, a clumsy elf accidentally shrinks two kids. When the kids are scooped up into Santa’s sack and dropped off across the street at their neighbor’s house, they have to work together to make it home for the holiday.

programme.title: Movie: Albert: The Little Tree With Big Dreams
programme.desc: Albert, a little Douglas Fir tree who loves Christmas more than anyone, goes on a road trip from his little nursery to the big city to make his dreams come true.

programme.title: Rugrats: Chanukah
programme.desc: During a celebration at the local synagogue, Tommy and Chuckie try to help Grandpa Boris settle a feud with Shlomo, a nemesis of Boris' from the Old Country.

programme.title: Rugrats: Rugrats Kwanzaa
programme.desc: Susie is told that the holiday of Kwanzaa is a time to honour the legacy of her great people. Not having won any trophies or awards like the rest of her family, Susie comes to the conclusion that she isn't great and won't be able to celebrate.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: It's a SpongeBob Christmas!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Frozen Face Off

programme.desc: Josh Gates' quest takes him from the frozen slopes of Mount Everest to the isolated forests of Bhutan, where Josh uses bait to force a more personal encounter with the creature and capture some of his best evidence yet.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunt for Extraterrestrials: Close Encounters
programme.desc: Josh begins his search for extraterrestrial life with an once-in-a-lifetime visit to NASA. He then hunts for evidence of aliens in Chile, where he views a UFO video captured by the military and assists scientists at the largest telescope on Earth.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunt for Extraterrestrials: Ancient Visitors
programme.desc: Josh's journey continues on remote Easter Island, where ancient alien theorists believe extraterrestrials visited millennia ago. He then visits the site of a recent meteorite strike in Zimbabwe that could prove life on Earth began in outer space.

programme.title: Engineering the Impossible: Egypt
programme.desc: Thousands of years after the first pyramids rose from the desert in Egypt, a team of engineers, builders and investigators attempt to resurrect these wonders of the ancient world, and uncover the secrets of their construction.

programme.title: Destroyed in Seconds
programme.desc: A bakery is hit twice by out of control cars; an historical building collapses suddenly; a base jumper takes a hard hit.

programme.title: Local Knowledge: Generation Next
programme.desc: Ali and Rush head out to the water with their 'little guys.'

programme.title: Legendary Locations: Angels or Demons?
programme.desc: Josh Gates shines a light on places darkened by the past, from a mysterious mansion connected to a haunted heiress in California to a colorful festival commemorating the death of a demoness in India.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Bering Sea Crash
programme.desc: Battling exhaustion, Wild Bill and his crew face the full wrath of the bomb cyclone. A snapped tendon puts the Summer Bay down a man. Josh gambles on crab-rich grounds in a costly venture north. An injured Mac fights to get Junior through the storm.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Gut Instinct
programme.desc: As an injury knocks Sig out of his wheelhouse, Mandy takes the helm to face a disgruntled Northwestern crew. On the Wizard, damaged hydraulics and an umbilical hernia deal Keith a double gut punch. Josh and Casey suffer tragedy on the Cornelia Marie.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Turkey Inseminator
programme.desc: Mike crawls through rat drops, falling insulation and debris to make a house more energy efficient and he visits a turkey farm where he gets to suck semen out of a bunch of large-breasted birds.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Buoy Cleaner
programme.desc: Mike Rowe learns how to make shingles in Oregon and clean buoys with a Coast Guard.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Rowe'd Trip: Dirty Infrastructure
programme.desc: Mike Rowe and his dirty crew hit the highway to see the sights and reminisce about classic American infrastructure jobs from the show's history. Along the way they check in with some of the hard-working men and women that keep the country moving.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Rowe'd Trip: Tight Spaces
programme.desc: En route to explore a cave, Mike Rowe and his dirty crew reminisce about classic jobs from the show's history that had them squirming into tight spaces. They also check in with some of the hard-working people that have been featured on the program.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Rowe'd Trip: Filthy Animals
programme.desc: Driving out to an ostrich farm in search of eggs, Mike Rowe and his dirty crew reminisce about classic animal-related jobs from the show's history. They also check in with some of the hard-working people that have been featured on the program.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Playing With Fire
programme.desc: Two survivalists are dropped on a deserted Dominica beach. When Dominica claims a casualty, surviving in a barren tropical terrain may prove to be too great a challenge.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Lost at Sea
programme.desc: A divemaster and a Navy Seal are, for the first time on Naked and Afraid, stranded at sea. On their arduous journey to land they face exposure to deadly sharks and heatstroke.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: My House Can Kill Me
programme.desc: Hsi Ming and Miranda are both mothers and extreme hoarders, leaving their children with little room to play.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: A Birthday Surprise
programme.desc: Bachelor alum Caila found her real-life prince charming, but to find her fairy-tale gown she must listen to her heart. Ridicule for her love of feathers has Jocelyn heartbroken and her consultant scrambling. Plus, a birthday surprise is in the works.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: I Wanna Be Naked
programme.desc: Alexis wants to look naked on her wedding day, and Courtney's last-minute indecision puts Randy to the test.
