programme.desc: Ronnie Anne and Sid have trouble finding an after-school program they both like. And, Ronnie Anne has to compete with her family for quality time when Maria takes a day off.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Culture Shock/ F.U.N.
programme.desc: Bob tries to assist Squidward with the annual talent show; Plankton is lonely.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Born to Be Wild/ Best Frenemies
programme.desc: Spongebob must protect the town from a biker gang; new smoothies are the talk of the town.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Two Faces of Squidward/ Spongehenge
programme.desc: SpongeBob slams the door in Squidward's face; Squidward gets surgery and becomes handsome.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Inside Job
programme.desc: Plankton infiltrates SpongeBob’s brain to steal the Krabby Patty formula.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Chaperone/ Employee of the Month
programme.desc: SpongeBob agrees to take Mr. Krab's daughter to the prom; Bob and Squidward battle it out.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Slumber Party/ Grooming Gary
programme.desc: Mr. Krab's enlists SpongeBob's help to be an undercover spy at Pearl's slumber party.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SB-129/ Karate Choppers
programme.desc: Squidward ends up in a freezer; Bob and Sandy's incessant karate sparring wreaks havoc.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Penny Foolish/ Nautical Novice
programme.desc: When SpongeBob finds a penny on the ground, Mr. Krabs becomes obsessed with having it in his possession. / SpongeBob tries to impress Mrs. Puff during a field trip to the Boating Museum.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Wet Painters/ Krusty Krab Training Video
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs has SpongeBob and Patrick paint the inside of his house; training for employees.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: House Sittin' for Sandy/ Smoothe Jazz at Bikini Bottom
programme.desc: All is quiet while SpongeBob is house-sitting for Sandy - until Patrick shows up.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Good, the Bad and Casey Jones
programme.desc: After encountering mutants and ninjas, Casey Jones decides to take on 'pure evil' alone. When he meets Raphael, the two hot-headed fighters must put their dislike for each other aside and work together against a common foe.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Fungus Humungous
programme.desc: A fungus mutant spreading through the sewers causes the Turtles and April to experience their worst fears as Leonardo must face his greatest fear-losing his team.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Metalhead Rewired
programme.desc: When Donnie upgrades Metalhead's artificial intelligence, he must decide if he can trust a sentient Metalhead or if he has created a new foe.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Of Rats and Men
programme.desc: When the Rat King returns, Splinter must overcome his guilt and fear of the Rat King controlling his mind in order to defeat his foe once and for all.

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World: Legend of Isla Nublar: Symptoms
programme.desc: Owen falls prey to the toxin of a poisonous prehistoric jungle flower and believes he's a raptor.

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World: Legend of Isla Nublar: The Monsters and the Mech!
programme.desc: Hudson desperately recruits powerful help to defeat Danny once and for all, in the form of the T-Rex.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: What a Gem/ Family Spirit
programme.desc: When Alvin sees a sparkling diamond buried in his neighbor's rose garden, he's sure she's responsible for the recent diamond heist. Alvin tries to get out of the annual family day picnic with Dave to go to the big soccer game.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: The App/ Don Juan Theodoro
programme.desc: When Dave gets a parenting app to help supervise the Chipmunks, Alvin tries everything to escape its control. Alvin, Simon, and the Chipettes give Theodore conflicting dating tips when they believe he has a crush on a girl.

programme.title: Movie: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The children's classic is brought to the big screen when the Smurfs accidentally invade the human world after being chased out of their own by an evil wizard.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Green Fingers
programme.desc: After Schwoz creates a disease that accidentally effects Charlotte, Henry, his family, and even Ray, he quarantines them in Henry's house in order to find a cure.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Dodging Danger
programme.desc: When Henry uses his new super power to compete in a Dodge-a-Leen tournament, Ray, Schwoz, and Charlotte go undercover to teach Henry a lesson.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Space Invaders
programme.desc: When Captain Man and Kid Danger find out that an astronaut from Swellview has been taken hostage aboard the Space Station, they use Schwoz's 'love shuttle' to blast off into space.

programme.title: The Thundermans: You Stole My Thunder, Man
programme.desc: When Max wins the school election that Phoebe had been working hard for, Phoebe plots revenge.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Thundersense
programme.desc: Phoebe impresses her classmates with her new ability to see the future. Meanwhile, Max pretends he has not gotten a new power to elicit sympathy from Barb.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Have an Ice Birthday
programme.desc: Phoebe and Max want to be trusted to have a normal teenage birthday party, but when a frozen Mrs. Wong goes missing and they have to find her, they realize how good their family parties truly are.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Up, Up, and Vacay!
programme.desc: The Thundermans enter a family competition to win a dream vacation, but they have different ideas about where to go. When they can't agree they enter as two different teams, boys vs. girls, with the winners getting to decide.

programme.title: Danger Force
programme.desc: Captain Man and Schwoz have a new group of four young superheroes to train.

programme.title: Young Dylan: Natural Beauty
programme.desc: Dylan tries to help Charlie with his homework. His unconventional style of doing his homework comes to a head when Dylan gets into a rap battle with the teacher.

programme.title: Nickelodeon's Unfiltered: Avocado Toasted Piñatas!
programme.desc: Celebrities hide behind animated characters, and it's up to a panel to guess who it is.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Big Deal/ Forbidden Feline
programme.desc: Cricket persuades the family to hit up a Thanksgiving sale for a sweet deal on a new TV. Tilly hits it off with Anoosh, the neighborhood cat.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Coffee Quest/ Phoenix Rises
programme.desc: When Big City faces a coffee bean shortage, Cricket and Gloria’s boss, Ms. Cho, challenges them to retrieve one of a few remaining sacks of coffee; When the Greens' dog, Phoenix, runs away from home, the family sets out to find her.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Uncaged
programme.desc: Cricket and Tilly’s rebellious mother Nancy Green is fresh out of jail and setting up shop in the city.

programme.title: Amphibia: Snow Day/ Cracking Mrs. Croaker
programme.desc: When a winter cold snap freezes all the frogs in Wartwood, Anne must protect the townspeople. In an effort to make Mrs. Croaker like him, Sprig digs up a secret from her past.

programme.title: The Owl House: I Was a Teenage Abomination
programme.desc: Luz sneaks into the local magic school to help a friend and makes a new enemy in the process.

programme.title: DuckTales: McMystery at McDuck McManor
programme.desc: When Scrooge unexpectedly disappears during his birthday party, Huey, Dewey and Louie find themselves hosting a mystery party where everyone is a suspect.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: The First Ever Summer Games Showdown
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Rat-a-Phooey!
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: DuckTales: Louie's Eleven!
programme.desc: Donald Duck and his nephews are reunited with Scrooge after moving into McDuck Manor.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Rumble for Ragnarok!
programme.desc: Donald Duck and his nephews are reunited with Scrooge after moving into McDuck Manor.

programme.title: Amphibia: Dating Season / Anne vs. Wild
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: Amphibia: Croak and Punishment/ Trip to the Archives
programme.desc: When Sprig's Blue Moon Shell is stolen, he and Anne investigate to find the crook. To prepare for Anne's quest, the Plantars go to the archives and accidentally get trapped!

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Headhunters
programme.desc: When someone tampers with Mabel's life-size wax statue, she and Dipper set out to find the culprit. Meanwhile, Grunkle Stan mourns over the loss of his wax doppelganger.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Hand That Rocks the Mabel
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel discover their seemingly cherubic new neighbour, Lil' Gideon, happens to be the town's adored psychic. But when Dipper convinces Mabel to go on a date with Gideon to question his authenticity, she soon learns that his cuteness can fade.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Welcome Home/ Raccooned
programme.desc: Cricket Green and his family move from the country to Big City to live with Gramma. Cricket and Bill accidentally disturb some raccoons in the garage, and they invade the house!

programme.title: Big City Greens: Fill Bill/ Critterball Crisis
programme.desc: When the Greens dine at a seafood restaurant, Cricket and Tilly decide to rescue a live octopus.

programme.title: The Owl House: A Lying Witch and a Warden
programme.desc: When 14-year-old outcast Luz discovers a portal to a new world, she meets a witch, Eda, and a demon named King. In order to get home, Luz has to help them with a mission.

programme.title: The Owl House: Lost in Language
programme.desc: Luz's pranks at the library lead to unintended consequences.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Fan Friction
programme.desc: When Karmi starts posting fan fiction about Big Hero 6, depicting Hiro as her boyfriend, Hiro is embarrassed and wants her to stop.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Internabout
programme.desc: Hiro, Baymax and the rest of the Big Hero 6 team continue their journey to San Fransokyo.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Bwar and Peace
programme.desc: Kick and Gunther venture to the Old Country where Gunther is mistaken for a warrior.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Sleepy River Wild/ Power Play
programme.desc: Gunther falls asleep on a waterpark ride/ Kick tries to get out of playing Romeo.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: If Books Could Kill/ There Will Be Nachos
programme.desc: Kick challenged a library's return policy after Gunther accidentally brings back a book signed by Kick's idol Billy Stumps. Kick is then determined to crash a party held by Brad, even though he was not invited, in an attempt to score some nachos.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: You've Been Brad'd/ Sleepover
programme.desc: After Kick discovers that he is the sole target of Brad's new Internet prank show, he must find a way to avoid his brother and complete an impossible stunt.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: For the Love of Gunther/ Father From the Truth
programme.desc: Kick trains his best friend to be a stuntman when Gunther reveals he has a crush.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Stumped Again/ The Kick Stays in the Picture
programme.desc: Kick must choose between helping his idol Billy Stumps in a monster truck show and helping his best friend Gunther with an important Viking coming-of-age ritual. Kick teams up with Jackie to take a photo for a billboard contest.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Living Mummies of Toth-Ra
programme.desc: In a lost pyramid, Louie interprets a pharaoh's prophecy to his advantage, forcing Scrooge and Launchpad to convince a group of living mummies to rescue him.

programme.title: DuckTales: JAW$!
programme.desc: Lena unleashes a magical megalodon in Scrooge's money bin.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Secret(s) of Castle McDuck!
programme.desc: On a family trip to Scrooge's ancestral castle, Dewey tries to hide the truth about his mom as his brothers search for family secrets.

programme.title: DuckTales: Treasure of the Found Lamp!
programme.desc: Donald Duck and his nephews are reunited with Scrooge after moving into McDuck Manor.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Rise: Invasion! The New King!

programme.desc: A boy named Nate find a capsule which give him a Yo-Kai watch for identifying Yo-Kai.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Dangerous Chemistry of Gandra Dee!
programme.desc: With Huey and Webby’s help, Fenton woos a punk rock scientist, only to uncover her dangerous plans for Gizmoduck.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: El Fuego
programme.desc: Professional mech-wrestler El Fuego is intent on becoming the toughest fighter in San Fransokyo and decides he must beat the strongest challenger he can find, Baymax.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dungeons, Dungeons and More Dungeons

programme.title: The Owl House: Once Upon a Swap
programme.desc: A simple disagreement leads to a complex situation when Eda, King, and Luz triple-down on a wager.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Skunked/ Axin' Saxon

programme.title: Big City Greens: Uncaged
programme.desc: Cricket and Tilly’s rebellious mother Nancy Green is fresh out of jail and setting up shop in the city.

programme.title: The Loud House: Selfie Improvement/ No Place Like Homeschool

programme.title: The Loud House: Lock 'N Loud/ The Whole Picture
programme.desc: Dad gets upset with the kids for never locking the front door; Lincoln accidentally erases his childhood photos.

programme.title: The Loud House: Teacher's Union/ Head Poet's Anxiety
programme.desc: To try and make gym class better, Lincoln and Clyde set Coach Pacowski and Mrs. Johnson up. Luan mentors Lucy teaching her how to manage the ups and downs of pursuing a life in the arts.

programme.title: The Loud House: Friends in Dry Places/ Coupe Dreams
programme.desc: While on a field trip, Lincoln worries that his friend group is splintering. In order to buy her dream car, Lori becomes a local rideshare driver.

programme.title: Nickelodeon's Unfiltered: Avocado Toasted Piñatas!
programme.desc: Celebrities hide behind animated characters, and it's up to a panel to guess who it is.

programme.title: Young Dylan: Natural Beauty
programme.desc: Dylan tries to help Charlie with his homework. His unconventional style of doing his homework comes to a head when Dylan gets into a rap battle with the teacher.

programme.title: Movie: Kung Fu Panda
programme.desc: A bumbling panda's dreams of being a warrior may come true when a villain comes to town.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Evil Orthodontist
programme.desc: Rachel may be falling for her ex-fiancé Barry, an orthodontist; Chandler has girl trouble.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Fake Monica
programme.desc: Monica's credit card is stolen, and along with Phoebe and Rachel, she decides to catch the person who stole it. The thief turns out to be so charming and inspiring that Monica decides to become friends with her instead of turning her over to the police.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Ick Factor
programme.desc: Monica dates a college boy who thinks she is his age, but she is the one who is surprised.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Birth

programme.title: Mom: A Bear and a Bladder Infection
programme.desc: When Christy's long-distance relationship begins to fizzle, she seeks the company of a former fling. Also, Bonnie tries to give up coffee.

programme.title: Mom: Charlotte Bronte and a Backhoe
programme.desc: Bonnie locks horns with Jill's 'inner strength' coach, Miranda. Also, Christy struggles to bounce back after being rejected from law school.

programme.title: Mom: Esta Loca and a Little Klingon
programme.desc: Christy and Bonnie help get Jill sober again, and Christy's boyfriend is less than understanding when it ruins his birthday weekend.

programme.title: Mom: Eight Cats and the Hat Show

programme.title: Mom: Crazy Snakes and a Clog to the Head

programme.title: George Lopez: George Gets Cross Over Freddie

programme.title: Full House: Room for One More?

programme.title: Full House: Prom Night
programme.desc: DJ's jealous when Steve's ex-girlfriend tries to rekindle their romance the night of prom.

programme.title: Full House: It Was a Dark and Stormy Night
programme.desc: DJ, Stephanie and Michelle get scared when Steve tells them a ghost story at summer camp.

programme.title: Full House: The Apartment

programme.title: Full House: Support Your Local Parents

programme.desc: 'The Insider' sends the sisters a tip that federal agents are targeting The Order in a raid on their businesses, and later sends a desperate plea for help when they suspect leaders have figured out their identity.

programme.title: Escaping Polygamy: Give Me Back My Daughters, Part 2
programme.desc: Jessica and Kollene continue the dangerous mission of helping Suzette find her daughter, Rosie, who years ago chose the religion over her very own mother. Suzette’s manipulative and potentially violent sister-wife is guarding Rosie’s every move.

programme.title: Escaping Polygamy: Forbidden Love
programme.desc: Jessica and Amanda receive a vague message from Megan, a young girl who recently escaped the FLDS polygamist cult, asking for help getting her boyfriend, Chris, out.

programme.title: Intervention: Susie and Miriam
programme.desc: These attractive and charismatic 41-year-old twins battle crack and alcohol addictions and each other as their career success and families slowly slip away.

programme.title: Intervention: Gina/ Kaila
programme.desc: Gina started using heroin to escape her domineering Korean mother who blamed her for her own rape. Kaila was teased for being overweight and now weighs a mere 80 pounds.

programme.title: Intervention: Sarah/ Mikeal
programme.desc: Like Romeo and Juliet on heroin, Mikeal and Sarah are a poor boy and a rich girl who have found solace in each other's pain.

programme.title: Intervention: Katie
programme.desc: Katie was the star of the family; she traveled the world as an elite Irish dancer. She could have made it a career but she got derailed into a life of partying and drugs that has led her down a dangerous path of cocaine and heroin addiction.

programme.title: Intervention: John/ Dionicio
programme.desc: John loves his job as a flight attendant but is suffering from alcoholism.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: To Hatch a Predator
programme.desc: The Jokers perform unusual methods of DNA testing and get too close for comfort at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser becomes a shell of a man after he cracks under pressure during a presentation at a children's museum.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: Fire Choir
programme.desc: Wolf Boykins returns to lead the 'Ex-SING-guishers', the station's choir group. Eddie teases Granny for joining the group but soon finds himself vying for a spot.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hell on Wheels
programme.desc: The guys try and work out the kinks as physical therapists, then pitch some way out-of-the-box ideas for TV hosts. Plus, the big loser gets rolled over by some speedy ladies.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Fraudway
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr one-up each other while trying not to laugh, and team up for a lunch that’s for the birds. Later, tonight’s big loser hits the Broadway stage, where he’s treated to a classic New York welcome by an agitated crowd.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Pantsing With the Stars
programme.desc: Find out which bizarre character wound up on the IJ cruise, which Joker once had to put a stranger's hand in his mouth, and which challenge was filmed in a basement. Plus, learn what punishment almost involved pantsing a CEO.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Crash Test Dummies
programme.desc: Find out which Joker doesn't like camping and what the guys say when they're asked for directions. Plus, learn which Joker has a thing for segways.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Show Stopper
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Joe and Murr are at Universal Studios in Hollywood. They start off serving up ridiculous surveys, then make things awkward while posing as maintenance workers. Plus, tonight’s big loser can't catch a break…no matter how many times he tries.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Urine Trouble
programme.desc: The guys play receptionists looking for suspicious names. The guys seek marriage advice from strangers after a private eye shares incriminating photos. The big loser goes from pissed off to pissed on in the matter of one punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Fast Feud
programme.desc: Four friends compete to embarrass each other in the ultimate hidden camera showdown.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Paternity Test
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr pose as concierges in a hotel lobby, and then commit insurance fraud with the help of some confused strangers. Afterwards, tonight's loser suffers a personal punishment that's anything but child's play.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Shame of Water
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Murr and Sal find scandalous diary entries written by their 'daughters', and then break up with significant others in front of strangers. The loser will find himself in hot water and on shaky ground while waiting tables.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Rock Botton
programme.desc: The guys 'do the farts' with actor Jeff Daniels, and then try to get strangers to take their sides in ridiculous arguments. Later, tonight's loser finds himself up against a wall around a group of college students.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: It's Electric
programme.desc: The guys pitch whimsical TV show idea to focus groups and then go to the park with their 'daughters' who share unpopular opinions. The loser heads to the spa for an electrifying punishment.

programme.title: Hot Ones: The Game Show: Love, Laughs and Lament
programme.desc: A pair of newlyweds go head to head against a pair of stand-up comedians to see who has the last laugh in the pepperdome. Only one team will fight through the pain and conquer Mount Scoville for a chance at $25,000.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Drum and Drummer
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Q and Joe convince shoppers to repeat odd catch phrases, then go mental as psychoanalysts. Plus, tonight's losers perform at a halftime show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: X Man
programme.desc: The guys compete in their first four-way challenge. Later, see what happens when they try to lead a kid's art class, and which loser fails so badly that he's hit with an on-the-spot punishment that leaves him seeing red.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Swim Shady
programme.desc: The guys hit some bad reception working at a desk. Plus, tonight's big loser takes photos of a water aerobics class, but ends up drowning in shame.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Training Day

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Spider Man
programme.desc: The guys give all-you-can-eat buffet customers all they can handle, and turn into real power tools while teaching workshops at a hardware store. Then, tonight's big loser suffers a punishment that will make your skin crawl.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Ash Clown
programme.desc: The guys give customers an eye opening experience at a glasses store, and convince customers to pass illicit, and ridiculous, messages while shopping for groceres.

programme.title: Hot Ones: The Game Show: A Hot Mess

programme.desc: A muscle-bound competitive eater and his new fiancée appear to have the edge in the pepperdome as they go against a duo of brothers who'll have to put their sibling rivalry aside if they want to walk away with the cash.

programme.desc: Game warden Eddins assists the local police with an animal cruelty case. Game warden Richards responds to a trespassing dispute, and Game warden Roraback relocates a snapping turtle. On the coast, Game warden Bailey cracks down on fishermen.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Here's the Story of a Lovely Lake House
programme.desc: Chris and Susan met at a local running group and quickly bonded over their love for the outdoors and their children. Now married and raising three teenagers, they're looking to purchase a lakefront home for their blended family.

programme.title: Mexico Life: Getting the Dog's Approval in Cabo San Lucas
programme.desc: An active California couple is eager to make the move to Cabo San Lucas with their chihuahua. Their top priority is a yard for their pooch, but must haves also include a gym, pool, ocean view, and three bedrooms.

programme.title: Mexico Life: Cooking up New Adventures
programme.desc: Newlyweds look to leave snowy Toronto behind and soak in the year-round sun, ocean, and beaches in Playa Del Carmen. They recently made an offer to purchase a restaurant in town, so they have to move quickly on buying a home.

programme.title: Beach Around the World: Exploring the Gold Coast of Costa Rica
programme.desc: A Phoenix couple who've visited Costa Rica several times feel like they are at home there and seek to leave a hectic lifestyle. They seek a home with the ocean as part of the new house.

programme.title: Beach Around the World: From Mountains to Coast
programme.desc: A Colorado couple move to Portugal to live a slower-paced lifestyle. They would like their home to be walking distance from the beach.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Minnesota Homecoming
programme.desc: As Bethany and Matt have begun to raise their son, they've come to realize that living in Chicago is just too far from their families back in Minnesota. Now that they're returning to their roots, they want to find a forever home on Forest Lake.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Here's the Story of a Lovely Lake House
programme.desc: Chris and Susan met at a local running group and quickly bonded over their love for the outdoors and their children. Now married and raising three teenagers, they're looking to purchase a lakefront home for their blended family.

programme.title: Renovation Island: Set in Stone
programme.desc: The resort's grand opening date looms over construction progress, as Bryan and Sarah focus on the clubhouse. The crew tackles the spa and gives the hotel sign a facelift. The Baeumlers get hit with unexpected expenses as their budget balloons.

programme.title: Mexico Life: Two Views in Puerto Vallarta
programme.desc: South Dakota couple Brad and Kevin are looking for a condo in Puerto Vallarta that has both mountain and ocean views. Kevin is a swimmer who loves being near the ocean, and Brad enjoys exploring the mountains.

programme.title: Mexico Life: New Life in Nuevo Vallarta
programme.desc: Colorado couple Allison and Gordan are looking for a property close to the beach in Nuevo Vallarto. After getting married on Maui, they knew they wanted to ditch the Rocky Mountain winters for 365 days of summer.

programme.title: Mediterranean Life: Cruising to Nice
programme.desc: A couple from New York fell in love at first sight with Nice and are now looking to make a property on the French Riviera their home away from home.

programme.title: Mediterranean Life: Sun, Fun and Love in Spain
programme.desc: After spending time in various countries, Katie and Frederick decide to move to Spain. They hope to find a peaceful property close to the beach so they can work from home and soak up the sun and sea anytime they want.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Moving Sale Makeover
programme.desc: A couple is moving out of state for work and needs Leslie and Lyndsay's help to sell their home. The twins revamp their outdated ranch with a modern farmhouse style designed to reel in buyers who love to entertain.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Rough Rambler Reno
programme.desc: A young family has outgrown their home, but major exterior issues and a dark interior are keeping it from being sold. Leslie and Lyndsay brighten and repair the outdated rambler, but pricing it right will be difficult with no comps in the neighborhood.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Road House to Show House
programme.desc: Leslie and Lyndsay help a family struggling to sell their roadside rambler. Hoping to distract buyers from the road noise outside, the twins make some bold design choices to turn the dated ranch house into a stylish home that a new family will love.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: No Appeal to Curb Appeal
programme.desc: A couple that's desperate to sell their bungalow after receiving no offers calls on real estate experts and twins Leslie and Lyndsay. The home needs some love to make it sellable, but the stakes are raised when the twins invest money to make improvements.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Split-level Struggle
programme.desc: Before a couple can buy their dream home, they must sell their outdated split level, and they're having trouble getting buyers in the door. Lyndsay and Leslie bring the home up to date with sleek, modern touches and minimalist elements.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Lake House Update
programme.desc: A woman who cares for her ailing father is struggling to sell her home in a desirable neighborhood. Leslie and Lyndsay jump at the opportunity to transform the outdated property into an industrial-chic showstopper that's perfect for a high-end buyer.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Empty Nest Turned Family Retreat
programme.desc: A dad and his two adult daughters are ready to move on in life, but they're struggling to sell their family home. Leslie and Lyndsay work to transform their dated, 1990s property into a coastal retreat that will attract a brand-new family.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Rental Property Reno
programme.desc: A contractor is desperate to sell his rental property that's a real wreck. When he's tempted to overspend on the renovation, twins Leslie and Lyndsay help steer Jeff toward a more budget-friendly makeover with an eclectic style.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Condo Cleanup
programme.desc: A young millennial's recent home improvement projects have made it hard for her to sell her condo. Twins Leslie and Lyndsay transform her DIY disaster into a hip, modern home, perfect for a first-time home buyer.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Better Than New
programme.desc: A couple wants to sell their home and move to the mountains, but they can't compete with new homes in their neighborhood. Lyndsay and Leslie update the house with a rustic style so it can contend with the new construction and attract high-end buyers.

programme.title: Home Town: Small Town Life for a Growing Family

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Model Deckhands
programme.desc: After the crew's first night off, Hannah puts her foot down when Bobby and Danny bring girls back to the yacht. Bryan attempts to smooth things over with the captain, but the boys are given their first strike.

programme.desc: Danny disobeys a direct order from Captain Mark when he decides to give a love poem to a charter guest. Julia calls her boyfriend in England, while Bobby's feelings for her grow stronger. Ben and Hannah's work relationship has reached smooth sailing.

programme.desc: The crew must provide a romantic trip for new guests celebrating their seven-month dating anniversary. Bobby gets the green light to go after Julia, while Tiffany and Bryan get cozy in the hot tub. Meanwhile, Ben takes Hannah on a date.

programme.desc: Matt helps three dogs who are in danger of losing their homes or their lives.

programme.desc: Features Basque pelota balls, pallet trucks, dumplings and brass faucets.

programme.title: How It's Made: Compression & Extension Springs, Micro Drill Bits, Skiffs, Backsplashes
programme.desc: Mark Tewksbury shows viewers how some familiar objects of everyday life are made.

programme.title: Lost Kingdom of the Black Pharaohs
programme.desc: The Kush Empire was an ancient superpower that dominated the Nile Valley.

programme.title: Mummy Unexplained Files: Tut's Darkest Secret
programme.desc: Cutting-edge science reveals new discoveries about the mutilated mummy of a young woman with a secret link to Tutankhamun; as experts use modern-day criminal forensics follow fresh leads, the bloody trail leads straight to the Boy King.

programme.title: Mummy Unexplained Files: Tut's Darkest Secret
programme.desc: Cutting-edge science reveals new discoveries about the mutilated mummy of a young woman with a secret link to Tutankhamun; as experts use modern-day criminal forensics follow fresh leads, the bloody trail leads straight to the Boy King.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Top Secret Nazi UFOs
programme.desc: Investigating claims that the Nazis had developed a brand new flying craft at a secret research facility in Northern Germany and that the Americans and Russians stole this technology after the war.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Secrets of the Alchemists
programme.desc: Nostradamus, Nicolas Flamel and John Dee were alchemists that had a profound effect on the world. Find out if they were clever deceivers or if they really could perform miracles.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Hitler's Executioner
programme.desc: We reveal the remarkable story of Johann Reichhart, the man who went from German state executioner before WW2 to head up a merciless Nazi killing machine which murdered thousands. In a bizarre twist of fate, Reichhart ended up working for the Allies.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Secret History of James Bond
programme.desc: James Bond is one of the famous characters in history, and new discoveries reveal there might be a secret truth behind this world-famous figure. Experts team up with a former spy to separate fact from fiction and reveal the secrets of modern espionage.

programme.title: Forbidden History: In Search of King Arthur
programme.desc: The legend of King Arthur is one of a courageous fighter and leader in battle, but for centuries, the fabled king has been a mystery to historians. Find out if his story of Camelot, Excalibur and Guinevere just an elaborate fairytale.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Mystery of the Cannibal Crypt
programme.desc: Mysterious tomb carvings provide dark evidence that ancient Egyptians practiced cannibalism, but we don't know why. New discoveries might finally answer this ancient mystery, and experts use modern-day tech to reveal more of Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Ramses' Forbidden City
programme.desc: Explorers in search of a lost city built by Ramses II uncover startling evidence that reveals the extent of ancient Egypt's scientific knowledge, and the new discoveries at this strange site offer more clues to Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Lost City of the Sun Cult
programme.desc: When experts unearth a mysterious lost city built by an infamous pharaoh, they find clues of a grisly catastrophe. New discoveries reveal the apocalyptic events that turned this place into hell on earth, offering more clues to Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Secrets of the Scorpion King
programme.desc: New evidence suggests that the mythological Scorpion King might have actually existed. New discoveries might answer this ancient mystery, and experts use modern-day tech to reveal more of Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Secrets of the Tomb Raiders
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal the secrets of Egypt's tomb raiders, and what ancient Egyptians did to ensure the treasures of their dead pharaohs wouldn't be stolen. The latest science answers these great mysteries, shedding new light on Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Finding Nefertiti
programme.desc: Scientists have spent years looking for the mummy of Nefertiti, one of ancient Egypt's most iconic pharaohs. The latest tech helps experts in their search, what they discover might reveal the shocking truth about how she died, and Egypt’s dark secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Curse of the Crocodile Queen
programme.desc: The Crocodile Queen was Egypt's first female pharaoh, but we don't who she was, or why she took this sinister alter-ego. New discoveries might finally answer this ancient mystery, and more of Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Tut's Curse: The New Evidence
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal if King Tut's tomb is indeed cursed, as it is said to have killed nine people. The latest science might finally answer this ancient mystery, and experts use modern-day tech to investigate more of Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: American Monster: Momma's Girl
programme.desc: Great-Grandfather Arthur Burney knows he's lucky to have such a large loving family. But when a dead body is discovered everyone becomes a suspect - and it'll take an unexpected tip-off to reveal the mastermind behind the murder.

programme.title: American Monster: Life of the Party
programme.desc: Doug and Rose quickly strike up a romance and later marry. But behind the perfect façade seen in these exclusive home videos, lies and deceit begin to surface. A no show at Thanksgiving and a box on the roadside lead to a shocking discovery.

programme.title: American Monster: The Last Valentine
programme.desc: In Oklahoma, Dr. John Hamilton and his wife Susan are the envy of all: successful, respected and very much in love - until a vicious Valentine's Day murder destroys their lives.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Deadly Fetish
programme.desc: When Debra Davis's husband accused her of being cold and immature for refusing to experiment sexually, she thought something was wrong with her. She never suspected her husband's perversions were signs that there was something evil deep within him.

programme.title: American Monster: Who Am I?
programme.desc: When Dianne Hart and Donnie Rudd begin an affair in a small Chicago suburb, Dianne's kids hope that their mom has found love. But instead it triggers a series of bizarre lies and deceptions that reveal a cold-hearted killer.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Lying in the Darkness
programme.desc: A jeep swerves off a dark stretch of road and takes the life of a loving mother. When law enforcement arrives, they discover evidence that the accident wasn't the cause of her death.

programme.title: American Monster: Flesh and Blood
programme.desc: Young parents Adriene and James Magee work hard to provide a stable life for their three small children in rural Louisiana. But underneath the idyllic scenes lurks a dark secret, culminating in a heinous double-murder at the hands of a loved-one.

programme.title: American Monster: Who Am I?
programme.desc: When Dianne Hart and Donnie Rudd begin an affair in a small Chicago suburb, Dianne's kids hope that their mom has found love. But instead it triggers a series of bizarre lies and deceptions that reveal a cold-hearted killer.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Lying in the Darkness
programme.desc: A jeep swerves off a dark stretch of road and takes the life of a loving mother. When law enforcement arrives, they discover evidence that the accident wasn't the cause of her death.

programme.title: American Monster: The Last Valentine
programme.desc: In Oklahoma, Dr. John Hamilton and his wife Susan are the envy of all: successful, respected and very much in love - until a vicious Valentine's Day murder destroys their lives.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: My Secret Nightmare
programme.desc: Tiffany Shore grew up knowing that her father was evil, but she still kept his secrets. When Tiffany finally escapes him, she is devastated to discover that has committed far more heinous acts than she ever imagined or knew about.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder: Bizarre Love Triangle
programme.desc: Ann returns home from shopping to find her husband, Anthony, lifeless in bed, a gun beside him. Police soon find a second victim, Jacqueline Riggs, in the basement, stabbed to death. What happened here is a dark tale of love, lust and violence.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder: Fade to Black
programme.desc: Film director Adrienne Shelly is discovered hanging by a bed sheet from the shower rod in her bathroom. It looks like a suicide, but her husband insists it was murder. And detectives are starting to believe him...

programme.title: 48 Hours on ID: NCIS: What Happened in Apartment 1601?
programme.desc: Real- life NCIS agents reveal how they solved a crime, starting at the beginning.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Fitbit Alibi
programme.desc: Nicole Vander Heyden was found dead in a field after a night on the town with friends. After police interviewed her boyfriend, he became their prime suspect. Data recorded about his activities on his Fitbit told a different story than he told police.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Father and Son
programme.desc: From the start a man maintained the death of his ex-wife was a suicide but to her son it was always murder and he was determined to have his father face a jury of his peers.

programme.title: Pandora's Box: Unleashing Evil: Dungeon of Dread
programme.desc: When an off-duty police officer in San Francisco happens upon a minor theft at a lumberyard one Sunday afternoon, he unwittingly jumpstarts an investigation into one of California's deadliest, most depraved serial killers: Leonard Lake and Charles Ng.

programme.title: Pandora's Box: Unleashing Evil: Bloodlust
programme.desc: When an officer pulls over a reckless driver in a routine traffic stop, he unlocks the key to a series of murders. Investigators from various jurisdictions work in tandem to track a sadistic killer with a penchant for torture, robbery, and bloodlust.

programme.title: Pandora's Box: Unleashing Evil: Heat of the Night
programme.desc: In El Dorado County, CA, firefighters combatting a raging fire discover a burnt out SUV with the charred remains of a beloved local man reported missing just hours earlier, igniting an investigation into a sinister scheme, and exposing a deadly affair.

programme.title: Pandora's Box: Unleashing Evil: The Devil's Ranch
programme.desc: A college student goes missing on Spring Break, and authorities work around the clock to locate him. When a man runs a drug checkpoint, the investigation takes a grisly turn into a world of drug smuggling, the occult, and human sacrifice.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Death by Neighbor
programme.desc: New beginnings take a horrible turn when members of a blended family become deathly ill after ingesting a rare poison.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: There's No Place Like Hell
programme.desc: Two neighboring Omaha mothers turn from friends to foes in a vicious spat, which ends with both their homes burned to the ground. But could a woman really burn down a house with innocent children sleeping inside? A wiretap reveals the real arsonist.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Daddy's Got A Gun
programme.desc: A decorated police officer and single father relies on his kind and generous neighbors to help care for his beloved daughter. When she accuses one of them of molesting her, anger boils over, all hell breaks loose... and blood flows in the streets.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Bang Goes the Neighborhood
programme.desc: A couple who trades the city for the country soon find themselves in conflict with the gun shop owners across the street. Mutual video cameras record threats, fights and growing hostilities that finally lead to shots fired and blood spilled.

programme.title: UFOs: Uncovering the Truth: Deathbed Confessions
programme.desc: Deathbed confessions have provided a wealth of new evidence to UFO researchers from top intelligence, government and scientific witnesses who were sworn to secrecy in life, but couldn't leave this earth without revealing the truth.

programme.title: UFOs: Uncovering the Truth: Ancient UFO Earth Landings
programme.desc: There's new evidence pointing to the possibility that ancient man was visited by extraterrestrials, influencing ancient technologies, architecture and art. One scholar reveals evidence supporting his theory that ancient Sumerians were created by aliens.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Hell in the Pacific
programme.desc: The brave men and woman who fought along the tides of the Pacific share their stories. Both Japanese and U.S. forces face off with an intense determination and will to survive.

programme.title: Against the Odds: 46 Days of Hell in Fallujah
programme.desc: Charlie Company of the 1st Cavalry Division wanders into an NVA stronghold. A blistering attack leaves supplies low, casualties mounting and the enemy circle tightening. Team Alpha, hearing the distress calls, volunteers to try the difficult rescue.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: D-Day and Liberation
programme.desc: Listen to the astonishing stories behind the liberation of France and hear the price many soldiers had to pay in order for the Allies to take France back from the Germans.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Mountain Massacre
programme.desc: The Black Devils, a joint American-Canadian mountain warfare unit, are about to go into action. They must mount a do-or-die night-time assault up a treacherous mountain, in extreme weather, to take on heavily-entrenched battle hardened German defenses.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of Berlin
programme.desc: Survivors recount the horrors and strength behind surviving such a merciless place and the shock of Allied soldiers as they discover the evil secret of Germany's concentration camps.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: D-Day and Liberation
programme.desc: Listen to the astonishing stories behind the liberation of France and hear the price many soldiers had to pay in order for the Allies to take France back from the Germans.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of Berlin
programme.desc: Survivors recount the horrors and strength behind surviving such a merciless place and the shock of Allied soldiers as they discover the evil secret of Germany's concentration camps.

programme.title: Against the Odds: 46 Days of Hell in Fallujah
programme.desc: Charlie Company of the 1st Cavalry Division wanders into an NVA stronghold. A blistering attack leaves supplies low, casualties mounting and the enemy circle tightening. Team Alpha, hearing the distress calls, volunteers to try the difficult rescue.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Hell in the Pacific
programme.desc: The brave men and woman who fought along the tides of the Pacific share their stories. Both Japanese and U.S. forces face off with an intense determination and will to survive.

programme.title: UFOs: Uncovering the Truth: Ancient UFO Earth Landings
programme.desc: There's new evidence pointing to the possibility that ancient man was visited by extraterrestrials, influencing ancient technologies, architecture and art. One scholar reveals evidence supporting his theory that ancient Sumerians were created by aliens.

programme.desc: There's new evidence pointing to the possibility that ancient man was visited by extraterrestrials, influencing ancient technologies, architecture and art. One scholar reveals evidence supporting his theory that ancient Sumerians were created by aliens.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Top Secret World War II
programme.desc: We've all heard about the ultra covert units used in WWII, the unbreakable codes, top secret underground nerve centers, and super-human navy seals, but here is what history forgot about WWII's most classified operations.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Breaking the Rules
programme.desc: We all know the significance of the Civil War, the CIA, the Civil Rights movement, and the advent of flight. There are many more rules that were broken to forge the American spirit that we don't know about. Joe Moniaci reveals what history forgot.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Secrets and Scandals
programme.desc: We all know Madison Square Garden as the world's most famous arena, and are well aware of the crime and corruption that surrounded prohibition bootlegging. Host Joe Moniaci exposes the secrets and scandals.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Fighting for Freedom
programme.desc: We've all heard the phrase 'go for broke,' remember the Fall of Saigon as Vietnam's bitter end, have listened to the legends spun around top-secret microfilm, and have seen the classic movie, 'the Dirty Dozen.' Here's what you haven't heard.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Alien Files
programme.desc: The final edition of the series examines a range of conspiracy theories relating to extra-terrestrials. There are those who believe that we have already made contact with aliens and that world governments are concealing this.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Kennedy Killings
programme.desc: Conspiracy theories surrounding the assassination of Robert Kennedy, the murder of TV presenter Jill Dando and the death of government weapons inspector Dr. David Kelly are examined.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Vanished
programme.desc: Examine some of the most famous cases of disappearances that have gone on to spawn conspiracy theories to explain them. John Bingham, 7th Earl of Lucan, union leader Jimmy Hoffa and Robert Maxwell come under discussion.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The KKK
programme.desc: We delve into the world of the most notorious white supremacist group in America, the KKK. Once having over a million members, today it's just a shadow of its former self. We meet real members and look at the impact of the group has had on America.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Brotherhood of the Blood
programme.desc: Sworn to protect and preserve the Holy Blood of Christ, the Brotherhood of the Blood are a dark and mysterious sect. We go on a quest to shed light on a group shrouded in secrecy through the ages, revealing the extreme methods the Brotherhood used.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Yakuza
programme.desc: We go on the hunt to unearth the secrets of a widespread criminal gang in the heart of Japan who are engaged in a variety of criminal activity including extortion, prostitution and illegal gambling. It is a hard-hitting, slick-dressing network of gangs.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Battle-Ready

programme.title: Hidden Gold: Rockin' Riches
programme.desc: A record player sitting in storage turns out to be a potentially great discovery. This job is packed with all sorts of mismatched items: the gang also discovers an awesome wagon that dates back before the days of Flexible Flyer.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Heritage Hunters: Hard Wood and Twisted Metal
programme.desc: Bug and Steve find a rare redwood water tank that has tons of potential, if they can salvage it properly. A new client stops by the yard looking to design an intricate hardwood feature for their home.

programme.title: Heritage Hunters: Mare Island Naval Yard
programme.desc: Bug and his team help transform a client’s kitchen with salvaged Douglas fir from the historic Mare Island Naval Yard.

programme.title: Heritage Hunters: Wine Stave Porch Railing
programme.desc: Bug and his team attempt a large, stubborn tear down that could be their biggest score ever, if the materials are even salvageable. Then, the gang takes on a front porch renovation that forces them to get creative with 18th-century Victorian materials.

programme.title: Heritage Hunters: Egg Feeder Barn Doors
programme.desc: Bug and the gang are tasked with one of the most dangerous salvage projects to date: bringing down a structure without damaging the building it's attached to.

programme.title: Heritage Hunters: Same Footprint, Bigger Kitchen
programme.desc: Bug and the team discover a treasure trove filled with salvageable old growth redwood, but the danger might outweigh the reward.

programme.title: Heritage Hunters: The Golden Oak Menace
programme.desc: Bug and his team travel to West Petaluma, CA, to take down a 95-year-old egg house that's dangerously close to a high-voltage power line.

programme.title: Restored: 1913 Craftsman Bungalow
programme.desc: Brett restores a 1913 craftsman bungalow for a young couple with a baby on the way. He's challenged with finding a way to bring back the natural wood in the house while still making it bright and welcoming.

programme.title: Restored: 1918 Arts and Crafts Bungalow
programme.desc: Brett Waterman helps a young family with two small children restore their home after a failed attempt to restore it themselves. The house has been in the family for generations so Brett's eye for historical accuracy is much needed.

programme.title: Restored: 1900 Victorian Farmhouse
programme.desc: A couple seeks Brett's help restoring their big 1900 Victorian Farmhouse in time for their wedding. They're hoping he can design a rustic kitchen, update the laundry area and add light to the interior rooms closed off by past modifications.

programme.title: Restored: 1922 American Colonial Arts and Crafts
programme.desc: Brett takes on a bright pink arts and crafts home with American Colonial elements. He uncovers lots of hidden features while returning the house to its 1922 roots.

programme.title: Restored: 1928 Spanish Colonial Mansion
programme.desc: Brett thinks he finally gets an easy restoration job on a stunning Spanish Colonial hillside mansion until he finds out it has a pink Victorian kitchen. Then he uncovers hidden treasure on the old woodwork but the homeowners don't share his excitement.

programme.title: Restored: 1905 Queen Anne Victorian Restoration
programme.desc: One of Brett's old high school friends asks him to help restore her 1905 Queen Anne Victorian bungalow. She has many unfinished renovation projects but wants to finish them. She also wants to convert a bedroom into the office it was designed to be.

programme.title: Restored: 1940s California Ranch Project
programme.desc: Brett is horrified when a local fire chief and his wife ask him to completely gut and restore their 1940s California Ranch. Brett sets out to show them they can have a kitchen with all the modern conveniences they desire.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Calgary Stampede
programme.desc: At the Calgary Stampede, Noah Cappe indulges in a slice of pizza loaded with edible insects.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Canadian National Exhibition/ Prairiefest
programme.desc: Noah Cappe is at the Canadian National Exhibition in Toronto to try a Thanksgiving waffle. Then he's off the Prairiefest in Oswego where he indulges in a kimchee Korean hot dog.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Livestock to Lemons
programme.desc: Noah Cappe gets a lesson in the meat that makes Texas famous, sampling the Texas chili burger and the big Texas barbecue baked potato. Then he tries a local legend's tamale recipe before rounding off the day with strawberry waffle bombs.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Renaissance to Rio Grande
programme.desc: Young squire Noah Cappe tries his hand at making the King's Court Conch fritters, decadent deep fried peanut butter and jelly brownie bites, a picquant fried green tomato BLT and the cookies and cream sandwich.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The Good, the Bacon, the Ugly
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads for the Lone Star state to eat his way through the Texas State Fair in Dallas, featuring some inventive foods like the bacon-tilla and the indulgent masterpiece of chicken fried lobster.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Children of the Corn on the Cob
programme.desc: From enchilada funnel cake to bacon bbq, Noah Cappe samples the menu at the Three Rivers Festival in Fort Wayne.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Million Dollar Baby Cakes
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to the annual Rio Rancho Pork and Brew festival in New Mexico.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The French Toast Connection
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to the San Diego County fair in California, for breakfast with a bang, indulging in French toast bacon bombs.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Camp Pop
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to northern Indiana, where the Hoosiers in Valparaiso are doing things right at the Porter County Fair. The Super Ramen Dog combines two delicious foods Noah didn't know belonged together, the Elephant Ear Taco.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Souperman
programme.desc: Noah Cappe ventures to the land of cheese for the Wisconsin State Fair and is greeted with the ooey-gooey French Onion Soup'r Stick.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Fried and Gone to Heaven
programme.desc: Some fried food is so crispy, so crunchy and so incredible that you feel like you've died and gone to heaven. Jeff Mauro heads to Proxi in Chicago for a food frenzy with the most-unique version of street corn ever imagined. Simon Majumdar takes his taste.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Thanksgiving
programme.desc: Chefs and food experts share their picks for a Thanksgiving to remember. Anne Burrell devours a turkey leg sandwich at Henry Public in Brooklyn, N.Y.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Sandwich Hall Of Fame
programme.desc: We're honoring the all-time favorite sandwiches in the 'Sandwich Hall of Fame,' because it's all about the bread and what's in between! If you've never had a BL'G'T, Eddie Jackson will tell you where to go.

programme.title: The Fall of France

programme.title: JFK Declassified: Tracking Oswald: The Iron Meeting

programme.desc: Cosmo and Wanda are exhausted, so Timmy volunteers to baby-sit and give them a night out. Timmy's tired of getting really bad haircuts from Dad.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Impopstar/ Football Camp
programme.desc: Cricket is mistaken for a pop star and decides to exploit the situation for all the perks of fame.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Photo Op/ Remy Rescue
programme.desc: Bill promises his family a trip to the mall food court but tricks them into going to a family portrait studio. Remy skips his violin lesson to hang out with Cricket.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Trailer Trouble/ Mansion Madness
programme.desc: Nancy's trailer is stolen by her old biker gang, and the kids resolve to get it back. Cricket house-sits for Remy, but things go awry when the rest of the Greens visit.

programme.title: Amphibia: Cursed!/ Fiddle Me This
programme.desc: After Anne helps Sprig break up with Maddie, strange things start happening to them. When a popular talent competition comes to Wartwood, Hop Pop goes overboard in training Sprig to win.

programme.title: The Owl House: Lost in Language
programme.desc: Luz's pranks at the library lead to unintended consequences.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Most Dangerous Game...Night!
programme.desc: When Louie’s quiet family game night goes wrong, the family deals with shrink rays, a secret civilization and an unhealthy competition.

programme.title: Marvel's Spider-Man: Goblin War: Part One
programme.desc: Spider-Man teams up with Spider-Girl, Ghost-Spider and Doc Ock to track down a new threat, the mysterious Goblin Nation.

programme.title: Marvel's Spider-Man: Goblin War: Part Two
programme.desc: Spider-Man and Harry Osborn seek the Goblin King to determine who is behind the Goblin Mask.

programme.title: Marvel's Spider-Man: Goblin War: Part Three
programme.desc: In order for Spider-Man to defeat the Goblin King, he must first bring together Doc Ock, Spider-Girl, Ghost Spider, Miles Morales and Harry Osborn as a team.

programme.title: Marvel's Spider-Man: Goblin War: Part Four
programme.desc: Spider-Man and his friends must stop the Goblin King before he destroys New York City.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Golf War
programme.desc: After being belittled by Pacifica one too many times, Mabel challenges her to a miniature golf-off which gets a tad out of control when some local residents offer their help.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Love God
programme.desc: Mabel takes matchmaking too far when she steals a love potion from a real Love God.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Tilly Tour/ Dinner Party
programme.desc: Tilly takes Gramma out to be a tourist for a day. Cricket and Remy arrange a dinner party for everyone to get to know each other.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Elevator Action / Bad Influencer
programme.desc: Gloria gets stuck on an elevator with the Greens. Remy falls under the sway of an internet influencer.

programme.title: The Owl House: Witches Before Wizards
programme.desc: Luz receives a map for a mystical quest from an ancient wizard.

programme.title: The Owl House: Once Upon a Swap
programme.desc: A simple disagreement leads to a complex situation when Eda, King, and Luz triple-down on a wager.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Write Turn Here
programme.desc: Hiro is forced to write a story for his class and decides to write a Big Hero 6 story. Meanwhile, strange versions of Noodle Burger Boy attack the team.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Prey Date
programme.desc: Hiro and Fred enlist Karmi to find out what Liv Amara is doing to cure Orso Knox, the man who was mysteriously turned into a monster.

programme.title: Motorcity: Battle for Motorcity
programme.desc: The Burners, a group of rebels led by 17-year-old Mike Chilton, set out to stop Kane from taking over their last oasis of freedom, a subterranean refuge dubbed Motorcity.

programme.title: Motorcity: Power Trip
programme.desc: Mike gets hold of a volatile energy source that could either defeat Kane or backfire.

programme.title: Motorcity: Ride the Lightning
programme.desc: The Burners must brave the elements to save Mike when Kane unleashes a weather machine.

programme.title: Motorcity: The Duke of Detroit
programme.desc: When Mike inadvertently disrespects a Motorcity power player named 'The Duke of Detroit,' the scoundrel thanks him by putting a price on the Burners' heads. Mike must find a way to appease the Duke before any harm comes to his team.

programme.title: Motorcity: Texas-ify It
programme.desc: The Burners team up with a strange group of Motor citizens to take down Kane, but the team learns the hard way that the enemy of your enemy isn't always a friend.

programme.title: Motorcity: Off the Rack
programme.desc: When Julie's loyalty to the Burners is questioned, she decides to prove herself by using a safety suit to pull off a dangerous mission.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Secret(s) of Castle McDuck!
programme.desc: On a family trip to Scrooge's ancestral castle, Dewey tries to hide the truth about his mom as his brothers search for family secrets.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Great Dime Chase!
programme.desc: Louie accidentally spends Scrooge’s Number One Dime and turns to mad inventor Gyro Gearloose for help to get it back.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Hurty Tooth / Sleepover Sisters
programme.desc: The Greens go on a family visit to the dentist's office where Cricket is determined to avoid Dr. Enamel and power through his toothache.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricketsitter/ Backflip Bill
programme.desc: Bill takes Gramma to a doctor’s checkup and leaves Tilly in charge of Cricket. Cricket learns that Bill never realized his childhood dream of becoming a gymnast.

programme.title: Amphibia: Anne Theft Auto / Breakout Star
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: The Owl House: I Was a Teenage Abomination

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Doof Side of the Moon
programme.desc: Two stepbrothers build various objects with materials found around their home.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: This Is Your Backstory

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Beak
programme.desc: A Super Villain challenges Phineas and Ferb after mistaking them for super heroes.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Phineas and Ferb Save Summer
programme.desc: Phineas, Ferb and the gang host a global concert – just as Doof's latest '-inator' invention moves Earth, putting summer in jeopardy.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Act Your Age
programme.desc: The kids are all teenagers for an episode as a result of someone behind the scenes answering a letter from the mailbag. Phineas has a crush on Isa, Candace has given up busting, and Doof is selling inators for cash.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Gramma's License/ Bear Trapped
programme.desc: When Gramma crashes into a parked police car, she loses her driver’s license and her confidence. Cricket Green hates bears.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Garage Tales/ Animal Farm
programme.desc: After finding a box of mementos, Gramma tells the kids the story of her greatest adventure. While the Greens are away, the animals compete to see who will rule the farm.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Family Legacy/ Paint Misbehavin'
programme.desc: Gramma tells Cricket and Tilly that there’s treasure buried on their property.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Urban Legend/ Wishing Well
